title: Senior Product Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The Role**
 We’re looking for a senior Product Manager to build user-facing products that impact hundreds of thousands of legal professionals. You’ll have the opportunity to join and lead one of the product teams shaping the core of the Legora platform, working across surfaces like our drafting products, tabular review, task management, and research and regulatory products.
   

  

 Wherever you land, the mandate is the same: build 0-to-1 products that help revolutionize a legacy profession. You’ll do it inside an AI-native company growing at hyper speed, with the autonomy to take ideas from a blank canvas to products that thousands of lawyers rely on every day. This is a rare chance to define entirely new categories of legal software, not iterate on the old ones.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Own the strategy, roadmap, and execution for one of our core user-facing product areas, such as drafting, tabular review, task management, or research and regulatory products.
* Build 0-to-1 products and features from the ground up, taking ideas from concept to launch and iterating quickly based on real user feedback.
* Partner closely with design and engineering to ship polished, AI-native experiences with a strong bar for craft.
* Deeply understand how legal professionals work, and translate their needs into intuitive, opinionated product decisions.
* Use AI as a core building block, shaping how legal professionals work with and trust AI in their day-to-day.
* Run experiments, instrument the right metrics, and turn data and qualitative insight into a prioritized roadmap.
* Move fast in a high-growth environment, balancing speed with quality and a relentless focus on user impact.


**What You Bring**
* An experienced, senior Product Manager with a strong background building user-facing products at high-growth B2B SaaS companies.
* A track record of building 0-to-1 products that have had a major impact on users.
* Hands-on experience building AI-native products, where AI is a central part of the experience.
* Strong product judgment and the ability to balance qualitative insight with quantitative rigor.
* Excellent collaboration skills, with a history of partnering tightly with design, engineering, and other functions to ship products.
* A genuine interest in revolutionizing a legacy profession and making complex software feel simple, fast, and enjoyable.
* High standards, low ego, and a bias toward ownership and outcomes.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Delivery Management Associate (socialsekreterare)
description:
Back to jobs
   

  

 Delivery Management Associate (socialsekreterare)
   

  

 Tandem Health
   

  

 People Ops
   

  

 Full-time
   

  

 On-site
   

  

 Stockholm
   

  

 Posted on 4/30/2026
   

  

**Job Description**
 Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 Tandem’s AI assistant empowers empowers social workers by generating relevant documentation (journalanteckningar, utredningar enligt IBIC, BBIC) directly from conversations.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Social Worker (socialsekreterare) to join our team in Sweden, with a focus on social services. This is a hybrid role combining project delivery, customer onboarding, and commercial support, with additional scope to shape how our product and go-to-market approach evolves for municipalities.
   

  

 This role is ideal for someone who became a social worker because they wanted to make a real difference, and who now wants to scale that impact through technology.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Lead onboarding and implementation projects for municipal social services customers, ensuring a smooth and successful rollout.
* Act as a trusted advisor to customers, helping teams adopt new ways of working and realise value quickly.
* Tailor Tandem’s product setup, workflows, and templates to the needs of different social services teams and municipalities.
* Work closely with Product and Engineering to translate customer needs into product improvements and new features.
* Help shape Tandem’s positioning, messaging, and marketing approach for the social services segment.
* Support the Sales team in strategic customer conversations, demos, and key deals by bringing domain expertise.
* Deliver user training sessions and ongoing support to ensure high engagement and confidence among users.


**What You Bring**
* Qualified Social Worker / Socialsekreterare with experience working in social services.
* Strong intrinsic motivation. You entered this field to help people and make a difference.
* Tech-savvy and curious about how digital tools can improve how social workers work.
* Experience working with digitalisation, systems implementation, operational development, or process improvement within a municipality.
* Strong project management skills.
* Commercial mindset and confidence supporting customer conversations.
* Excellent stakeholder management skills, with the ability to build trust with Tandem users, as well as senior decision-makers.
* Proactive, resourceful, and willing to go beyond what is expected to get things done.
* Comfortable in a fast-moving startup environment where priorities evolve quickly.
* Fluency in Swedish and strong communication skills in English.


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of
 **Stockholm** 
 where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition (Ellie)
* First interview with our MedOps Lead (Jenny)
* Second interview with our Country Manager (Roy)
* Working Day — Join us in the Stockholm office for a day to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*
 Apply for this position

title: Compensation & Benefits Lead
description:
**About The Role**
 As a Compensation & Benefits Lead within the Total Rewards team, you will support the delivery of the organisation's global compensation, benefits, wellbeing, and recognition programmes. This is a specialist, individual contributor role where you will provide key expertise and analytical support to ensure our reward practices remain competitive, equitable, compliant, and closely aligned with our talent and business objectives.
   

  

 Working within a highly collaborative HR function, you will partner closely with Finance, Payroll, Talent Acquisition, and business leaders across multiple geographies to deliver reward initiatives that enhance employee attraction, retention, and performance. This is a fantastic opportunity to play a hands-on role in major global projects, including HR technology implementations, organisational redesigns, and reward harmonisation initiatives, while directly influencing strategic workforce decisions through data-driven insights.
   

  

**You Will Be Responsible For**
* Supporting the annual compensation review cycle, including salary increases, bonus planning, and incentive administration.
* Supporting the design and delivery of the reward strategy as well as providing expert advice on compensation, benefits and reward policy.
* Conducting market benchmarking and compensation analysis using external salary surveys to maintain competitive salary structures and job architecture frameworks.
* Supporting the management and annual renewal of employee benefits programmes across multiple countries while managing key vendor relationships.
* Support the development of recognition and incentive programmes across the assigned business line.
* Producing regular reporting, analytics, and dashboards on pay, benefits and benchmark data to identify trends, opportunities and risks.
* Monitoring internal pay equity and supporting global pay transparency, gender pay gap, and regulatory reporting requirements.
* Participating in global reward projects, process optimisations, and change management activities to enhance the employee experience and value proposition.
* Ensuring all reward programmes comply with legal, regulatory, and governance requirements while maintaining absolute data integrity across systems.


**Essential Skills**
**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:**
* Proven experience in Total Rewards, Compensation & Benefits, Reward
* Proven experience supporting end-to-end annual compensation review cycles.
* Experience with job evaluation methodologies and familiarity with market data providers such as Mercer, WTW, Korn Ferry, or Radford
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a demonstrated ability to interpret complex numerical data.
* Advanced Microsoft Excel skills and reward data analysis alongside practical experience working with HRIS platforms and reporting tools.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence and build relationships across HR and business leadership.
* Strong attention to detail and the utmost discretion when handling highly confidential information.


 NICE TO HAVES
   

  

* Experience working within a multinational or matrix organisation with exposure to global compensation and benefits practices.
* CIPD qualification or an equivalent professional HR accreditation.
* Technical experience with HR platforms like Hi-Bob, Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, or Oracle HCM.


**Who We Are**
 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 1800 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 16 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Hybrid work policy
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enrol in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts


**JOIN US!**
 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
   

  

 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
   

  

**As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please**

title: Performance Marketing Specialist
description:
Är du en performance marketer som älskar att gräva i siffror och hitta den där optimeringen som får en kampanj att plötsligt lyfta?
 **Trivs du med att testa dig fram – nya kanaler, nya målgrupper, nya format – tills du hittar det som faktiskt fungerar?** 
 Framför allt – vill du vara den som äger performance-kanalerna rakt över två affärsmodeller, med stor frihet att forma hur vi jobbar? Då kan du vara vår nästa Performance Marketing Specialist!
   

  

****Om rollen****
 På Bokadirekt är vi på en spännande tillväxtresa som Sveriges största marknadsplats och SaaS-plattform för hälsa och skönhet. Du blir en nyckelspelare i hur vi driver tillväxt på två fronter samtidigt – dels genom att attrahera nya konsumenter till bokadirekt.se, dels genom att generera kvalificerade leads till säljteamet på B2B-sidan. Det är sällan man får äga performance i en verksamhet med både en marknadsplats och en SaaS-produkt i samma bolag, och det är precis den bredden som gör rollen unik.
   

  

 Du rapporterar direkt till Head of Marketing och blir en del av marknadsteamet, där du samarbetar tätt med kollegor inom Marketing Automation, Digital Content & SEO samt Marketing Managers för att säkerställa att kampanjerna hänger ihop över hela kundresan – oavsett om mottagaren är en konsument som ska boka en behandling eller en salongsägare som ska börja använda vår plattform.
   

  

****Vad du kommer att göra****
* Forma, driva och ha ägandeskap av både kort- och långsiktig performance-strategi över hela funnel
* Planera, bygga och optimera kampanjer i kanaler som Google Ads, Meta, TikTok och LinkedIn
* Driva resultat genom strukturerad testning, målgruppsstrategi, budgethantering och kontinuerlig optimering
* Analysera kampanjresultat löpande och optimera mot mål med hjälp av data och insikter
* Bidra med djup insikt i data och kund-/konsumentbeteende till teamets bredare affärsutveckling


****Vem du är****
**Vi tror att du har:**
* 2–5 års erfarenhet av performance marketing – antingen in-house eller på byrå
* Praktisk, hands-on erfarenhet av Meta och Google Ads
* God teknisk förståelse för spårning, tagghantering och hur plattformar och dataflöden hänger ihop (t.ex. Google Tag Manager, pixlar och API-kopplingar mellan annonsplattformar och våra system)
* Skarp förmåga att analysera siffror, se möjligheter och fatta datadrivna beslut
* En affärsdriven och proaktiv inställning – du väntar inte på att få instruktioner, du ser vad som behöver göras och gör det
* Full av energi och initiativ – du kommer med idéer, driver projekt framåt och inspirerar de du samarbetar med
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga, både muntligt och skriftligt, på svenska och engelska
* Vana vid att hantera flera prioriteringar parallellt i en snabbrörlig miljö


**Meriterande om du har erfarenhet av:**
* Att arbeta med både B2B- och B2C-kampanjer – du vet att de kräver olika mål, budskap och kanalstrategier, och trivs med att växla mellan dem
* Relevant utbildning inom digital marknadsföring, ekonomi eller motsvarande
* Fler plattformar utöver Meta och Google Ads, t.ex. TikTok, LinkedIn eller programmatiska verktyg
* God vana vid Google Analytics och/eller motsvarande verktyg (såsom Amplitude) för löpande uppföljning och analys
* Branschen skönhet, hälsa och/eller andra tjänstemarknadsplatser


****Vad vi tror på****
* Samarbete: Vi tror att fantastiska saker händer när människor arbetar tillsammans. Vi uppmuntrar till öppen kommunikation, projekt över teamgränserna och en kultur där varje idé blir hörd.
* Gemenskap: Vi är mer än bara en arbetsplats. Oavsett om det handlar om after-works, kickoffer eller att fira milstolpar tillsammans, tror vi att starka relationer bygger ett bättre företag.
* Engagemang: Passion driver allt vi gör. Från att ständigt förbättra vår plattform till att hjälpa tusentals företag att växa – vi är dedikerade till att göra varje bokningsupplevelse helt sömlös.


****Förmåner****
* Friskvårdsbidrag: Vi erbjuder ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag som gör det enklare att investera i din hälsa.
* Gratis massage: Njut av kostnadsfri massage på kontoret varje månad och ge kroppen en välförtjänt paus.
* Tjänstepension: Vi erbjuder tjänstepension för att ge dig trygghet och bidra till din framtida ekonomi.
* Gemenskap & företagskultur: Bli en del av en kultur som präglas av samarbete, ägarskap och innovation. Genom regelbundna kickoffer och sociala aktiviteter stärker vi gemenskapen och har roligt tillsammans.
* Flexibelt arbetssätt: Arbeta enligt en hybridmodell med fyra dagar på kontoret. Onsdagar är vår gemensamma inspirationsdag med frukost och tid för samarbete.
* Modernt kontor: Ett centralt beläget och modernt kontor i hjärtat av Stockholm.
* Konkurrenskraftiga villkor: Vi erbjuder en konkurrenskraftig lön och ett attraktivt förmånspaket.


****Om tjänsten****
* Startdatum: Omgående/Enligt överenskommelse
* Plats: Centrala Stockholm på Kungsgatan 38 (Hybrid)
* Anställningsform: Heltid, tillsvidare
* Sista ansökningsdag: 14 augusti


**Ansökan**
 Redo att driva vår performance-tillväxt framåt? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag! Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag, så vänta inte för länge.
   

  

 Sommaren är här och även vi passar på att ladda batterierna. Under semesterperioden kan våra svarstider därför vara något längre än vanligt, och urvalsprocessen återupptas från vecka 32.
   

  

 Tack för ditt tålamod – vi önskar dig en riktigt fin sommar och ser fram emot att höra från dig!

title: Paid Marketing Specialist
description:
Etraveli Group is a leading global flight technology provider, specializing in flight sales and offering flight content delivery and fintech products. We are here to solve complexity, by connecting millions of flights and travelers across the globe, from search and selection to trip and beyond.
   

  

 We partner with major global platforms such as Booking.com, Google Flights, Skyscanner, and Kayak, providing seamless flight booking and related services. Our B2B portfolio includes Precision, our specialist in travel fintech; Tripstack, our B2B Flights as a Service Provider and world leader in virtual interlining, serving as the gateway to Etraveli Group’s flight content and fulfillment services; Wenrix, the AI Infrastructure for profitable growth in air; and Flygresor.se, Sweden’s leading flight comparison site. We also operate our own online travel agency brands including Gotogate, Mytrip, and Flightnetwork.
   

  

 Every day we strive to make the world smaller for our customers and bigger for our people. Our diverse team of more than 3200 passionate professionals is what makes us the industry’s tech wonder and the best in the world at what we do.
   

  

 Major offices in Sweden (HQ), Greece, India, Canada, Israel, Poland, UK, and Uruguay.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Paid Marketing is a core driver of our growth and profitability, operating at scale across multiple markets and channels. We are currently taking the next step by building a stronger in-house capability with greater ownership of both strategy and execution.
   

  

 As a Paid Marketing Specialist, you will report directly to our Senior Paid Marketing Manager and play a critical role in executing, optimizing, and scaling our SEM, Affiliate, Retargeting, and Display performances. This is a highly hands-on, data-driven role where you will manage massive campaign structures while actively helping to build our in-house operational setup.
   

  

 You will step into a setup that is large-scale, complex, and highly customized. We operate in the fast-paced travel space, managing one of the largest Paid Marketing programs globally. Our structure is built around real business opportunities rather than textbook best practices. To succeed, you must be a curious, analytical problem-solver who loves going deep into the details, diagnosing performance patterns, and executing at a world-class level.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
* Execute and Optimize: Manage hands-on execution of SEM, Affiliates, and other performance channels across 40+ markets and 200+ sites.
* Manage Campaigns at Scale: Take daily ownership of campaign builds, bidding strategies, and highly granular account structures.
* Leverage Automation: Work closely with our internal tooling, leveraging Javascript, Python, and Marketing APIs to manage, generate, and optimize massive campaigns.
* Analyze and Interpret Data: Navigate large datasets to monitor performance, flag underlying issues, and quickly identify immediate growth opportunities.
* Drive Testing: Design, launch, and analyze continuous A/B and causal impact tests across ad copy, landing pages, and bidding strategies to unlock incremental growth.
* Support In-Housing: Collaboratively transition operations away from external consultants, documentation, and legacy setups into a streamlined, in-house powerhouse.


**What You Bring**
* Obsession with Precision: You operate with a level of detail where minor errors do not pass you by. You understand that in a setup with millions in monthly spend, small oversights have real financial consequences.
* Experience with Scale and Complexity: You have proven, hands-on experience managing large-scale Paid Marketing accounts with substantial budgets. You are comfortable navigating thousands of campaigns and millions of ad groups simultaneously.
* Strong Analytical and Coding Foundations: You are fluent in data. Advanced proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets is non-negotiable. Preferably, you possess working experience with Javascript, Python, or Marketing APIs, allowing you to comfortably interact with AI tools, scripts, and automated campaign management systems.
* Comfort in Non-Standard Environments: You thrive in nuance. You don't need a textbook blueprint to succeed; you are energized by highly granular, custom-built environments and can drive clarity out of complexity.
* Proactive Ownership: You don't wait for a task list. You actively monitor accounts, spot anomalies or opportunities, and take immediate initiative to optimize and fix them.


 We will start reviewing applications in week 33.
   

  

**Why Join Us?**
 You will work on a core product that shapes the travel experience of millions of users worldwide, in a dynamic and evolving industry. You'll work with a passionate team dedicated to excellence, be a key player in shaping our flight and air ancillary content strategy, influence partners, and grow in a supportive environment that values innovation. If you're ready to elevate your career and make a real difference in the world of travel, apply now and become a vital part of our mission to be the best in the business!
   

  

**Benefits**
 The culture at Etraveli Group embraces complexity and we like to keep the entrepreneurial spirit even as we grow into being a larger company.
   

  

**With Us You Can Enjoy**
* A flexible working environment. We work on a hybrid-model where you can choose to work two days from home and you have two weeks per year that you can choose to work from a remote location
* Modern office in the heart of the city – A bright and central location with great access to public transport, lunch spots, and parks just around the corner.
* Healthcare allowance – Each employee receives a maximum allowable amount each year according to the Swedish Tax Agency to spend on health-promoting activities such as a gym card, massage etc.
* Pension and health insurance – Through partners we offer a comprehensive pension and health insurance so that you can get help quickly in case of an accident.
* Daily breakfast – To kick the day off just right, breakfast is available at the office every morning.


**As part of this recruitment process, we will be conducting background checks. You will be able to read more information and give your consent to this process in the application form.**
 Diversity disclaimer
   

  

 At Etraveli Group we value diversity; we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds. During hiring, we are committed to ensure equality and promote diversity in the workplace at every selection stage. As such, we provide the same opportunities for all candidates regardless of race, religion or belief, gender, nationality, ethnicity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic protected under any anti-discrimination law or regulation.

title: Reverse Engineer
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

 Reverse Engineer
   

  

 The EA Security team protects EA by reducing our exposure to security risks. We raise risk awareness for the entire company and provide measured, proportionate security and risk management controls, services and solutions.
   

  

 The Reverse Engineer I is a member of EA Security's Secure Platform Engineering & Anti-Cheat Response (SPEAR) team and will report to the manager of the Gameplay Integrity Operations sub-team.
   

  

 As a Reverse Engineer I, your primary job will be to analyse cheats developed against EA's games and to make it harder for cheat developers to create new cheats. Your work will help ensure fair and fun gaming experiences for EA's customers across all of EA's games.
   

  

 Lastly, you'll need to determine risk posed by the gameplay integrity issues you discover and communicate your findings across teams to both technical and non-technical audiences.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Reverse engineer unobfuscated user-mode cheats developed for PC, mobile, and consoles
* Document and report on the functionality of the cheats you've analysed
* Use architecture and design documentation to create anti-cheat assessment scoping documents and define cheating test-cases for upcoming anti-cheat assessments
* Perform anti-cheat assessments of pre-release products
* Consult with and advise EA game teams on how to mitigate specific cheats
* Identify cheat variants that defeat previous mitigations, and suggest solutions


**Qualifications**
* Knowledge of operating system fundamentals (processes, threads, virtual memory)
* Read and understand x86/x64 assembly language
* Experience with a debugger such as WinDbg, x64dbg, OllyDbg, or gdb
* Experience with a disassembler such as Ghidra, IDA Pro, Binary Ninja, or radare2
* Read and understand one or more of C++, C#, Java, or .NET CIL


**Additional Qualifications**
* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or Information Security
* Information Security certifications such as CEH, CISSP, GSEC, OSCP, OSCE, or Security+


**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: Test Manager
description:
* Understand and review requirements for payment products and specifically for hybrid addresses
* Define test scenarios and expected outcomes, fail scenarios
* Define and understand issue tracking and documentation
* Understand system documentation and architect descriptions
* End-to-end test planning and coordination for projects
* Communication with external/internal stakeholders, e.g. program and epic owners, on test related matters
* Coordinate execution of manual tests with system testers

title: Organizational Transformation Consultant
description:
**About Us** 




 At Stellar Capacity, we empower individuals and organizations to thrive amid digital transformation. Through cutting-edge programs in leadership, AI, innovation, and change, we partner with clients globally to accelerate impact.
 



 As we scale, we're seeking a results-driven AI Business Developer to fuel growth, deepen client relationships, and help us deliver transformational experiences.
 



 In this role, you will be at the forefront of how organizations across different industries understand, explore, and work with AI. If you're excited by the idea of empowering others through education, we’d love to hear from you.
 



  





**Your Role** 




 As an Organizational Transformation Consultant, you will partner with clients to understand goals, explore options, and co-create clear program proposals. Work alongside our design, marketing, and operations teams to ensure a consistent and seamless experience from first meeting through delivery. You’ll also participate in AI programs to gather insights, strengthen relationships, and identify thoughtful next steps. In this role, you will leverage your understanding of people and culture to build deep trust and design solutions that truly drive business impact.
 



  





**What You Do** 



* Build and nurture long-term client relationships, acting as a trusted advisor who understands evolving organizational needs and grows accounts organically over time.
* Map and engage the full stakeholder landscape within each account; identify champions, build credibility across HR and business levels, and ensure no relationship is single-threaded.
* Invest in people: remember the details, follow up with intention, and make every client feel like a priority, not a pipeline entry.
* Lead key relationships: serve as the day-to-day point of contact for strategic accounts; steward executive touchpoints and stakeholder alignment.
* Run organizational diagnosis and solutioning: diagnose capability gaps, shape tailored recommendations, and translate client needs into high-impact program proposals.
* Own the consultative sales cycle: proactively qualify, scope, propose, negotiate, and secure mid- to large-size organizational transformation engagements.
* Identify new business opportunities by understanding client challenges and articulating the transformative impact AI can have on their people and business.
* Develop and advance pipeline through targeted outreach, network building, and timely follow-up; align closely with marketing on campaigns and events.
* Support "all things program + sales": contribute to decks, one-pagers, agendas, briefs, delivery checklists, follow-ups, and case studies.
* Partner cross-functionally: channel client and market insights to refine offerings, messaging, and GTM (go-to-market) strategies; ensure strong handovers to delivery.
* Represent the brand at webinars, workshops, and industry events, and convert interest into meaningful next steps.



  





**What You Bring** 



* A deep interest in or experience from organizational transformation, HR, leadership, learning and development, or business consulting. You understand how people and organizations grow.
* Exceptional relationship-building skills and a natural ability to connect with people at every level, turning first conversations into long-term partnerships.
* A proven track record of building trust and driving results with clients, combined with a strong commercial mindset.
* Comfort and confidence with proactive outreach, relationship management, and driving activity toward pipeline targets.
* A creative and solution-oriented mindset; you think beyond templates to design what fits the client’s unique culture and needs best.
* Strong presentation and storytelling skills with senior stakeholders, paired with clear, persuasive writing.
* Experience supporting program delivery (workshops, cohorts, training) and collaborating across teams.
* An organized, process-driven approach, and comfort with CRM systems, funnel metrics, and forecasting.
* Genuine curiosity about AI, leadership, and learning; you love turning innovative ideas into action.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.



  





**How You Operate** 




 You thrive in high-velocity environments and keep standards high while moving quickly. You’re proactive, resourceful, and hungry to do your best- willing to roll up your sleeves and do what it takes to turn opportunities into impact. You stay grounded, put the mission and team ahead of ego, and measure success by shared results.
 



  





**What we offer:** 



* Hands-On Impact: A unique opportunity to drive sales for high-impact programs that empower leaders and organizations worldwide.
* Dynamic Environment: Be part of a vibrant, innovative team that values creativity, collaboration, and results.
* High Candor, Low Ceremony: We give direct, respectful feedback - fast.
* Career Advancement: Accelerate your career in a rapidly expanding company with opportunities for leadership and professional growth as a member of our leadership team.
* Global Opportunities: Build relationships with top professionals and organizations across the globe.

title: Onboarding Specialist
description:
**Är du vår nya Onboarding Specialist?** 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Vill du ha en nyckelroll där din struktur och din kommersiella känsla gör verklig skillnad varje dag? Vi utökar nu vårt Customer Success-team och söker en Onboarding Specialist som vill vara med och säkerställa att våra kunder får en upplevelse och leverans i absolut världsklass från dag ett.
 



  





 I den här rollen blir du navet i vår uppstartsfas och den givna högra handen till våra Customer Success Managers (CSM). Du rapporterar till vår Chief of Customer Experience och blir spindeln i nätet som ser till det administrativa flyter på som smort.
 



  





**Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter** 




 Rollen är bred, varierad och perfekt för dig som trivs med att ha många bollar i luften och gillar att driva saker i mål. Du kommer bland annat att:
 


* Vara stjärnan på uppstartsmöten där du för protokoll, fångar upp viktiga detaljer och sedan proaktivt förbereder allt inför lansering.
* Skapa struktur vid onboarding genom att sätta upp admininlogg, skriva manualer och informera interna avdelningar (som kundtjänst samt ekonomi och administration) om nya objekt.
* Stötta CSM-teamet i det löpande arbetet med att förbereda presentationer, avtal, enklare rapporter och informationsutskick.
* Hålla dialogen levande med våra kunder och hyresgäster – vilket innebär allt från att ta enklare mail och samtal till att jaga in uppgifter eller underlag som saknas.



  





**Vem är du?** 




 För att trivas och lyckas i rollen tror vi att du är en person som får energi av ordning och reda, samtidigt som du är flexibel när prioriteringar ändras.
 



 Vi söker dig som:
 


* Är strukturerad och noggrann – du ser detaljerna som andra missar och älskar när saker blir "klara och inskickade".
* Är en skicklig kommunikatör i både tal och skrift, och trivs med att lyfta luren eller skriva ett trevligt men bestämt mail när uppgifter eller underlag behöver jagas in.
* Har en orädd "can do"-attityd, tar gärna egna initiativ för att lösa dagliga operativa problem och tar eget ansvar för dina leveranser.
* Har god allmän datorvana (gärna i Office-paketet/Google Workspace) och trivs med administrativa flöden.



  





**Vi erbjuder** 



* En central roll: Du är en avgörande del av kundupplevelsen och företagets ansikte utåt.
* Ett fantastiskt team: Bli en del av en hjälpsam och positiv teamkultur där vi stöttar varandra och har roligt på jobbet.
* En het produkt: Du blir expert på en marknadsledande plattform i en bransch som kokar.
* Tillväxtresa: Få chansen att utvecklas i ett bolag som växer i rekordfart.
* Kultur & arbetsmiljö: Vi är ett bolag som tror på energi, glädje och gemensamma framgångar. På kontoret i Sickla hittar du allt från golfsimulator till pingis, biljardbord – och ett team som trivs tillsammans.



  





**Övrig information:** 



* Omfattning: Heltid, tillsvidare
* Placering: Kontoret i Sickla



  





 Låter det här som du?
 



 Vänta inte – ansök idag och bli en del av Parkit-resan!

title: Global Mobility & Immigration Lead
description:
**TL;DR:** 
 We're hiring a Global Mobility & Immigration Lead to own immigration, relocation, and expat support as Lovable scales across Sweden, the UK, the US, and beyond. You'll set policy, run cases end-to-end, manage vendors, and personally support employees and their families through complex cross-border moves — while building the AI-native systems and self-service guidance that make global mobility easy to navigate as we grow.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**The Role**
 This role sits at the intersection of policy design, operational execution, and human support. You’ll be the single accountable owner for immigration, relocation, and expatriate matters globally. You’ll set frameworks, manage vendors, and personally support employees (and their families) through complex and often stressful cross-border transitions.
   

  

 This isn’t a paperwork-processing role. It requires strong judgment, comfort with ambiguity, and the emotional intelligence to support employees - while using AI to build scalable, well-instrumented systems as our hiring and relocation volume grows. This is an operator role with the ability to execute pragmatically and strategically.
   

  

**What You’ll Own**
* Global Mobility & Relocation — Design, implement, and iterate relocation and mobility policy and execution for international hires and internal transfers (housing, registrations, personal number pathways, social security, tax onboarding, benefits coordination).
* Employee & Family Support — Be the trusted point of contact for relocating employees and their families. Deliver calm, clear guidance through high-stakes moments, balancing policy consistency with individual context.
* Vendor & Stakeholder Management — Own relationships with immigration counsel and relocation vendors. Partner deeply with People Ops, Legal, Finance, Talent, and leadership on workforce planning, location strategy, and risk mitigation.
* Build AI-Native Global Mobility Function — Redesign how mobility is delivered using AI:
+ Build employee-facing “next step” guidance that is personalized, multilingual, and always up to date.
+ Create internal copilots and checklists for case management, document quality, and exception handling.
+ Instrument the journey with metrics (time-to-permit, time-to-settle, employee satisfaction) and use insights to continuously improve.
+ Maintain strict privacy and compliance boundaries—AI should increase trust, not reduce it.


**What We’re Looking For**
* Proven experience owning global mobility and immigration, with specific expertise in Sweden, UK and USA.
* Experience scaling a mobility function in a high-growth tech company.
* Track record running cases end-to-end (not just overseeing), including complex scenarios and exceptions.
* Strong policy and operational ability: you can design frameworks and execute cases in the same week.
* Experience managing vendors (relocation providers, immigration counsel) with clear SLAs and quality standards.
* High emotional intelligence and cultural sensitivity; able to support employees who are stressed, confused, or unfamiliar with local systems.
* Excellent organization and attention to detail, paired with pragmatic judgment.
* Demonstrated use of AI/automation to improve operations or employee experience.


**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.

title: Digital Workplace Transformation Leader - Sweden
description:
**Role** 
 – Industry Principal /Digital Workplace Transformation Leader
   

  

**Skill** 
 - Digital Workplace Transformation
   

  

**Location** 
 – Sweden
   

  

**Compensation** 
 – Competitive (including bonus)
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Digital Workplace Advisory Group is a strategic practice unit established to help orchestrate the breadth of Infosys digital workplace service offerings across the technology service-lines, complemented with experience design, digital adoption & learning services to deliver an integrated and human-centric experience to our enterprise clients in their journey to the future of work. This team is responsible for driving integrated Go To Market incubating industry solutions, Managing Analyst Briefings & provide technology advisory services to Client execs in their digital transformation of workplace.
   

  

**Your role**
 In the role of Industry Principal, you would be part of team of digital workplace transformation leaders and evangelists on future of work who specialize in leading organizations through digital workplace transformation by leveraging emerging workplace technologies. You will work on customer engagements to define, sell and guide customers on initiatives in the areas of digital workplace strategy, employee experience transformation, workplace modernization, organizational change and smart workspace design.
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
* Provide technology advisory services to Client Executives on their digital workplace strategy & roadmap.
* Lead large digital workplace transformation programs as a trusted Technology advisor to clients working with multiple client stakeholders, business groups and service providers.
* Provide best-fit architectural solutions, technology consultation, assist in defining scope and sizing of work, create technology differentiation to ensure high quality technical solutions and thought leadership for digital workplace.
* Manage a range of stakeholders and subject matter experts to ensure alignment to business needs.
* Liase with various integration forums and internal governance committees
* Strategic and Large deal advisory – Lead integrated solutions for large proposals or client programs (digital workplace).
* Program manage large consulting/advisory engagements for digital workplace.


**Required - Mandatory:**
* Experience in IT .
* A Digital Workplace Technology strategist and evangelist who specializes in leading organizations through digital transformation by leveraging emerging technology and articulating the strategy to deliver new products, business paradigms and ecosystem partnerships that enable growth and increase operational efficiency.
* Well versed with Industry Standards, OEM Standards, and Service Offerings in the “Digital Workplace” domain to be able to provide solution advisory and transformation strategy.
* Experience across the breadth of Digital Workplace Technology domains in Three or more of the below service offering domains –


 Employee Experience, Modern Workplace and Endpoint Management, Digital Collaboration (Team Collaboration , Cloud Voice & Meeting & Collaborative Apps ), DaaS & Device lifecycle Management (Modern device and endpoint management, Cloud Virtual Desktops, Device Analytics & experience management ), Connected Workspaces ( IoT, AR/VR ), Workplace Security), Digital Adoption & Change Management ( incl. Workplace Analytics), Service desk & experience, ( incl. Conversational AI & Automation).
   

  

**Personal**
 Besides the professional qualifications of the candidates, we place great importance in addition to various forms personality profile. These include:
   

  

* Excellent in Verbal, written communication.
* Strong stakeholder management and negotiation skills to be able to influence or manage difficult stakeholders both internal and external – partners, service providers and customers.
* Willingness and flexibility to learn new technologies (learnability, having a pulse on industry trends), scale up quickly and adapt to different roles as the situation demands.


**Why Infosys**
 Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 56 countries to navigate their digital transformation & an equal opportunity employer. With over three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
   

  

 Visit www.infosys.com to see how Infosys (NYSE: INFY) can help your enterprise navigate your next.
   

  

 All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.

title: IT Advisory Consultant
description:
### **Assignment Description**


* The boundaries between Internal IT, product technology, Security, Enablers, People Experience & Brand and other relevant functions.
* Ownership and governance across internal digital services, workplace platforms and employee experiences.
* Current and future business needs, including scalability, speed, collaboration, security and operational resilience.
* Opportunities to use AI, automation, data and emerging technologies within the internal technology environment.
* The effectiveness of collaboration across business, people, security, technology, procurement and operational functions.
* Organizational dependencies, overlaps, capability gaps and unclear accountabilities.
* Suitable operating models, governance structures, service ownership models and decision-making forums.
* The balance between strategic ownership, internal capabilities, shared services and external partners.
* The role of vendors, managed service providers, technology partners and other ecosystem participants.
* Opportunities to simplify, consolidate or strengthen the technology and supplier ecosystem.
* The capabilities that should remain internal and those that may be sourced through partners or shared services.
* The future role, mandate and organizational positioning of Internal IT.

  


**Responsibilities**


* Rapidly understand the organization, its strategy and Internal IT landscape.
* Clarify the mandate, scope and boundaries of Internal IT.
* Engage senior stakeholders to assess needs, dependencies and current ways of working.
* Evaluate the current Internal IT operating model, capabilities, governance, security, employee experience and partner ecosystem.
* Identify key risks, gaps, overlaps and opportunities for improvement.
* Develop and assess future-state options.
* Recommend a target operating model, including ownership, governance, capabilities, collaboration and sourcing.
* Define a pragmatic implementation roadmap and support leadership alignment.
* The ideal candidate is a senior Internal IT leader or IT strategist with significant experience in organizational and technology transformation.


**Personal Skills**


* Senior leadership or advisory experience in Internal IT strategy and transformation.
* A proven track record of designing, transforming or leading modern Internal IT organizations.
* Strong experience in employee-facing, corporate and workplace technology, rather than customer-facing product development.
* Experience from complex, international and fast-changing organizations.
* Broad knowledge of enterprise technology, AI, cloud, cybersecurity, digital workplace and employee experience.
* Experience defining operating models, governance, service ownership and organizational accountabilities.
* Strong understanding of sourcing, strategic partners, managed services and technology ecosystems.
* The ability to connect business strategy, employee needs and Internal IT priorities.
* Strong analytical, facilitation and stakeholder-management skills, with credibility at executive and operational levels.
* The ability to identify core issues quickly and translate them into pragmatic recommendations.

title: Förvaltningsproduktledare med informationsansvar
description:
Vill du vara med och forma morgondagens digitala infrastruktur inom hälso- och sjukvården? Gillar du struktur, strategisk informationshantering och att bygga broar mellan teknik och verksamhet? Vi söker en driven och kompetent delobjektledare/förvaltningsproduktledare som vill leda utvecklingen av Region Stockholms centrala MDM-plattform.

**Om rollen**
=============


I rollen som förvaltningsproduktledare har du ett helhets- och ledaransvar för planering, styrning och samordning av förvaltningen för MDM-plattformen – en etablerad och kritisk miljö för hantering av masterdata inom förvaltningsobjektet POFS.


Ditt uppdrag har en tydlig taktisk och strategisk vikt för verksamheter inom Region Stockholm. Du säkerställer inte bara att tjänsten är tillgänglig och ändamålsenlig idag, utan du driver aktivt den långsiktiga utvecklingen och etableringen av masterdata för att möta framtidens komplexa vårdbehov. Rollen kräver ett starkt ledarskap då du koordinerar och vägleder komplexa samarbeten mellan verksamhetsspecialister, informatiker, leverantörer och andra förvaltningar, både regionalt och nationellt (bland annat Inera).

#### **Arbetsuppgifter inom ledning och styrning:**

* Ledning & planering: Leda, strukturera och långsiktigt planera förvaltningen och vidareutvecklingen av MDM-plattformen.
* Driva förändring: Driva och etablera ramverk för masterdata inom hela Region Stockholm.
* Taktisk samordning: Leda och koordinera tvärfunktionella team bestående av leverantörer, verksamhetsspecialister och interna resurser.
* Behovsanalys & Vision: Samla in, analysera och omsätta komplexa verksamhetsbehov till långsiktiga, strategiska förvaltningsplaner.
* Styrning & Kvalitet: Säkerställa att robusta processer, riktlinjer och rutiner för masterdata etableras, efterlevs och kvalitetssäkras.
* Livscykelhantering: Taktiskt planera uppgraderingar och långsiktig livscykelhantering i nära samverkan med objektledare IT.

**Vem är du?**
==============


För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är en naturlig och kommunikativ ledare med en utpräglad analytisk förmåga. Du har ett strategiskt helhetsperspektiv och trivs med att transformera komplexa utmaningar till strukturerade, långsiktiga planer. Du besitter förmågan att inspirera, engagera och leda team mot gemensamma mål, samtidigt som du navigera tryggt i förändring och hanterar parallella, taktiska processer.

**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du ha:**

* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT, systemvetenskap, informationsförvaltning eller annat relevant område.
* Du har minst 2 års erfarenhet av att leda team, produkter eller förvaltning, exempelvis som förvaltningsledare, produktledare eller i en liknande roll.
* Erfarenhet av kravställning, testarbete och styrning av externa leverantörer.
* Dokumenterad förmåga och stark vilja att leda, motivera och utveckla andra i team.
* God kännedom och praktisk förståelse för förvaltningsstyrning enligt PM3 eller motsvarande styrmodell.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska.

**Vi ser det som meriterande om du har:**

* Erfarenhet av strategiskt informationsarbete inom offentlig sektor och/eller hälso- och sjukvård.
* Djupare kunskap inom masterdata (MDM) eller strategisk informationshantering.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av DevOps, ServiceNow och ReqTest.

**Vårt erbjudande**
===================


Vi erbjuder dig en nyckelroll i ett strategiskt viktigt och växande område där ditt ledarskap direkt bidrar till utvecklingen av Region Stockholms framtida digitala ekosystem och informationsinfrastruktur.


Här får du möjlighet att arbeta på en arbetsplats med hög samhällsnytta i en tid av stor digital utveckling, tillsammans med kompetenta och engagerade kollegor där samarbete och gemensamma mål står i fokus.


Vi har kollektivavtal och med det följer kollektivavtalade försäkringar, tjänstepension och möjlighet till löneväxling. För att du ska kunna ta ansvar för din hälsa erbjuder vi friskvårdstimme och friskvårdsbidrag samt subventionerad sjukvård i form av kostnadsfri öppensjukvård. Flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet till att arbeta hemifrån har vi för att underlätta för dig att få ihop vardagen. Här kan du läsa mer om förmånerna i vårt kollektivavtal.
Vi sitter i moderna lokaler på Lindhagensgatan 98 med utmärkta kommunikationer.

**Ansökan**
===========


Låter det här som något för dig ser vi gärna att du söker så snart som möjligt. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande. För en komplett ansökan räcker det med att bifoga ditt CV. När du ansöker kommer du att få besvara ett antal frågor, dessa ersätter personligt brev.


Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta tf enhetschef Charlotte Schönqvist, charlotte.schonqvist@regionstockholm.se.


Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

**Övrigt**
==========


Tester ingår som ett andra steg i rekryteringsprocessen. Vi använder oss av Assessios tester MAP och Matrigma. MAP är en personlighetstest och Matrigma är ett problemlösningstest som båda bygger på arbetspsykologisk forskning. Testerna används som ett komplement till dina erfarenheter och kompetenser.


Hälso- och sjukvårdsförvaltningen stödjer Region Stockholms politiska organisation för att invånarna i Stockholms län har tillgång till en god och säker hälso- och sjukvård samt tandvård. Det innebär att förvaltningen beställer och följer upp hälso- och sjukvård och tandvård för 75 miljarder kronor årligen. Förvaltningen ansvarar också för kunskapsstyrningsorganisationen i Region Stockholm, samt en rad funktioner som är avgörande för hälso- och sjukvårdssystemet, såsom smittskydd, vårdhygien. Läs mer här  




Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar. Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser. Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen. Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion. Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Fiol och stråklärare
description:
**Arbetsplats**
---------------


Varje dag går cirka 1800 personer till arbetsplatsen Östhammars kommun för att leverera välfärd och utveckling så att vårt lokala samhälle kan fortsätta vara tryggt och attraktivt. Vi gör det tillsammans, med engagemang, ansvar och öppenhet. Det är vi stolta över.


Kulturskolan består av ett glatt gäng som har lång erfarenhet att jobba i kulturskola. Skolan präglas av uppdraget att ge barn och unga en möjlighet för praktiskt utövande kreativa och konstnärliga ämnen. Inom skolan finns idag allt från sång och musikinstrument till teater, dans, foto/film och konst och form. Skolan genomför också årliga satsningar från statenskulturråd där nya konstformer prövas. Skolan kännetecknas av decentraliserat arbetssätt där alla orter får tillgång till grundutbudet av sång och musikinstrument, men där övriga konstformer finns utspridda i kommunen. Tex. Dans i Alunda, konst och form i Gimo etc.


Den individuella undervisningen sker till stor del på skoltid, medans gruppverksamhet och ensembler sker efter skoltid. Skolan har ett viktigt uppdrag i att möjliggöra inflytande och aktivt deltagande för eleverna. Eleverna synliggörs främst genom avslutningskonserter och föreställningar, men även andra typer av arenor som filmvisningar, vernissager, Open stage och delaktighet i lokala arrangemang i kommunen.


**Arbetsbeskrivning**
---------------------


Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat innefatta:

* Undervisning. Som fiol och stråklärare undervisar du både induviduellt och i grupp. Du har allt från nybörjare till äldre elever som behöver större utmaningar.
* Besök i klassrummen för att introducera instrument, hitta nya elever och bygga relationer.
* Turnéer på skolorna för att visa upp instrument och spela. Ingå i olika tvärpedagogiska projekt med andra lärare och konstformer på skolan.
* Administration av elevbokningar
* Elevkonserter av olika former, oftast i slutet av terminen men även när det uppstår möjligheter och behov.


Östhammars kulturskola undervisar på fem orter och varje dag är en ny dag med nya elever. Vi undervisar på individuellt på skoltid och i grupp efter eller i anslutning till skoltid.


Den nuvarande stråkläraren kommer ta uppdraget som samordnare och finns kvar som mentor och bollplank.


**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------


Vi söker dig som har musik - kulturpedagogisk utbildning på högskolenivå, körkort och grundläggande IT-kunskaper


Det är meriterande om du även har erfarenhet av att undervisa för barn, individuellt och i grupp samt arbetat i bokningsystemet studyalong eller liknande administration.


Som person anpassar du dig lätt till nya förutsättningar och krav. Du är engagerad och relationsskapande vilket vi värdesätter såväl i kontakt med elever, vårdnadshavare och andra kollegor. Utöver detta har du en god struktur över ditt arbete och känner ett ansvar att leverera bästa möjliga undervisning för att eleven ska uppnå uppsatta mål.


Låter detta som en beskrivning av dig? Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!


Östhammars kommun välkomnar alla sökande då vi eftersträvar blandade arbetsplatser och ser våra olikheter som en styrka och tillgång.


I den här rekryteringen har vi valt vilka kanaler vi vill synas i och undanber oss därför ytterligare erbjudanden om annonsering och rekryteringshjälp.


När du söker jobb hos oss ber vi dig söka digitalt för att få effektiv, snabb och säker hantering av din ansökan. Om du av någon anledning inte kan registrera din ansökan digitalt kan du skicka din ansökan märkt med referensnummer till:


Östhammars kommun


Kommunledningskontoret, HR


Box 66


742 21 Östhammar

title: Head of Enterprise IT
description:
**ABOUT THE ROLE**


We are looking for a visionary Enterprise IT Manager to lead the strategic evolution of the department. You will maintain our high standards of daily operations by managing enterprise IT systems, devices, and support services for our engineering and business teams. You will also actively pivot the organisation to focus on Engineering Enablement to create great conditions for our developers to build and ship software without friction.

 **YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:**  

  

Global Team Leadership

* Lead, mentor, and evolve a distributed team of 35 IT professionals across eight countries and multiple time zones.
* Manage six direct reports, fostering a culture of autonomy, customer service, and technical curiosity.
* Travel occasionally to our key hubs to build relationships and align operations.

  

Engineering-First Strategy

* Partner with Engineering VPs and Leads to understand their pain points.
* Tilt the IT roadmap to prioritise developer efficiency—whether that means high-performance compute hardware, optimised network low-latency routes for testing, or efficient VPN solutions to make it easy to test our applications.

  

Operational Excellence at Scale

* Oversee the lifecycle management of hardware, software, and mobile devices for the entire 2,000-person workforce.
* Manage corporate networks and security protocols, balancing security requirements with the flexibility engineers need to work effectively.
* Ensure our Global Service Desk provides "white glove" support to everyone from the C-suite to the Junior Dev.
* Level up the IT supplier landscape, leveraging on opportunities to consolidate and evolving IT supplier management.

 **OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:**

  

ESSENTIAL SKILLS

* You have previous success in a **comparable Enterprise IT management position** within a modern tech environment.
* You have experience **managing managers**. You know how to run a 30+ person organisation across multiple countries and time zones (EU/UK/US), focusing on strategy and unblocking your team. You know how to build culture remotely.
* You **communicate proactively and strategically** with Engineering VPs and business leaders to ensure IT is recognised as a strategic enabler. You focus on transparency and clarity to build trust and alignment across the wider organisation.
* You have a strong background working within or alongside software development organisations. You **understand the SDLC** (Software Development Life Cycle) and how IT decisions impact compile times, build speeds, and developer happiness. You understand what a compile time is and why local admin rights matter.
* You possess an excellent ability to **communicate with both technical** Engineering VPs **and non-technical** business leaders (Finance/HR).
* You have experience **negotiating contracts** with global hardware/software vendors and managing the logistics of hardware distribution to challenging locations.
* You have **knowledge of enterprise networking**, specifically tuned for a distributed workforce.
* You are **versatile** - you can present a budget to the CFO in the morning and dive into a complex distribution logic problem with your team in the afternoon.


NICE TO HAVES

* Engineering background: as a SysAdmin, a DevOps engineer, or a Developer.
* A strong preference for automating onboarding, offboarding, and provisioning processes. You prefer code/scripts over manual tickets.

 **WHO WE ARE**

  

At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 1400 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 11 offices worldwide.

 **BENEFITS**

* Hybrid work policy (3 days a week in the office)
* 4 weeks of Workation *(T&C apply)*
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enroll in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts

 **JOIN US!**

  

In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!

  

Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!

 **As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please**

title: Senior Backend Engineer - Sports
description:
**ABOUT THE ROLE**


Join our team as a Senior Software Engineer and play a crucial role in driving our organisation's growth through the development of outstanding products.


LeoVegas Group is building something special – a world-class team dedicated to creating the best Sportsbook platform in the market through cutting-edge technology and innovative gaming experiences.


This is a dynamic team that will be working on creating new cool features and integrating them into LeoVegas platforms.


We’re seeking a dynamic individual who can deliver state-of-the-art code while prioritising performance and scalability.


We are recruiting for our **Tiger Sportsbook Team!**


In Sportsbook we work in a high-volume, real-time environment, integrating data feeds with our modern trading system and transactional betting platform (UI/Backend). Your contributions will cover maintaining/expanding our current Betting/Trading services as well as building new services and capabilities for our users.


As a key member of our team, you’ll collaborate effectively while also demonstrating initiative and a passion for sharing innovative ideas.

**YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:**

* Taking ownership, problem-solving and collaborating with other teams.
* Designing and implementing from idea to production.
* Building for scale, availability, performance and security across the stack.
* Working with product managers, architects, QA engineers and other developers in a highly collaborative agile environment.
* Integrating new products and building internal services to support our ecosystem.
* Conducting code reviews and mentoring team members.
* Ensuring services are production-ready, observable, and maintainable through monitoring, alerting, and on-call participation.

**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE:**


ESSENTIAL SKILLS:

* 6+ Years of software development experience with Java, Spring Boot and Event-Driven Architectures.
* Experience designing microservices, K8s, containerization (Docker) and Kafka messaging systems.
* Knowledge of relational and NoSQL databases and caching.
* Implementing resilience patterns (e.g., retries, circuit breakers, graceful degradation).
* Designing and maintaining monitoring dashboards (e.g., metrics, logs, traces) and alerts to proactively detect issues.
* Hands-on experience developing highly scalable RESTful end-to-end microservices.


NICE TO HAVES:

* Familiarity with Reactive Programming (e.g. RxJava) and Vert.x would be a big plus.
* Experience in platforms like AWS and Google Cloud Platform.
* Online gaming and gambling experience

**WHO WE ARE**


At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 2000 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 21 offices worldwide.

**BENEFITS**

* Hybrid work policy
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enrol in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts

**JOIN US!**


In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!


Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!

**As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please**

title: IT-arkitekt
description:
Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-08-14


Sök tjänsten IT-arkitekt


Läs mer om våra förmåner och att arbeta i Motala kommun:


Arbeta i Motala kommun


**Om arbetsplatsen**
--------------------


Vill du bli vår nya kollega? I Motala, Östergötlands sjöstad, är vi öppna, stolta och nyskapande. Vår kommun är rätt plats för att bidra, utvecklas och trivas. Med ett ansvarsfullt uppdrag anpassar vi oss till förändringar och agerar för utveckling av ett hållbart sjöstadsliv i Motala kommun.
  

  

Tillsammans gör vi livet bättre!
  

  

Gemensamma ledningsförvaltningen består av verksamhetsområdena Demokrati & service, Ekonomi & upphandling, Arbetsliv & digital teknik, Strategisk samhällsplanering, Räddningstjänst & säkerhet, samt staben.
  

  

Förvaltningen har till uppdrag att leda, stödja och samordna hela kommunorganisationen på kommunstyrelsens uppdrag. Detta görs genom att ha kundens behov i fokus samt att vi har en helhetssyn och gemensamma arbetssätt. Vi är en lärande organisation som främjar nyskapande och lärande av både omvärld och varandra.
  

  

IT-enheten i Motala kommun ansvarar för kommunens digitala infrastruktur som varje dag stödjer kommunens verksamheter och invånare. Vi arbetar tillsammans med verksamheterna för att utveckla, förvalta och säkra en modern, stabil och ändamålsenlig IT-miljö som skapar verksamhetsnytta i vardagen.
  

  

Hos oss blir du en del av ett kompetent team där teknik, verksamhet och utveckling möts. Vi tror på samarbete, kunskapsdelning och ett öppet arbetsklimat där det är nära till beslut, högt i tak och lätt att få stöd av kunniga kollegor. Du får en nyckelroll i kommunens fortsatta digitala utveckling där du är med och formar målarkitektur, driver utvecklingsinitiativ och omsätter verksamhetens behov till hållbara digitala lösningar.
  

  

Du arbetar med IT-arkitektur, digitalisering och i uppdrag som spänner från strategisk utveckling till konkret genomförande. Här finns möjlighet att påverka både den strategiska utvecklingen och de lösningar som stärker kommunens verksamheter. Ditt arbete bidrar till en säker och effektiv digital miljö som gör verklig skillnad för både medarbetare och invånare. Kommunen befinner sig i en spännande utvecklingsfas där du får möjlighet att påverka framtida arkitektur, standarder och vägval för hela organisationen.
  

  

Vill du vara med och utveckla framtidens digitala kommun?
**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------


Som IT-arkitekt har du en nyckelroll i kommunens utvecklingsresa. Du bidrar till att skapa en sammanhållen, säker och långsiktigt hållbar IT-miljö där teknik och verksamhet utvecklas i samspel. Du förvaltar och tillämpar IT- och arkitekturprinciper samt bedömer nya lösningar utifrån bland annat verksamhetsnytta, integrationer, informationssäkerhet, förvaltning och teknisk komplexitet.
  

  

Du stödjer projekt, upphandlingar, systemägare och styrgrupper med arkitekturella bedömningar och rekommendationer. En viktig del av uppdraget är att motverka lokala särlösningar, främja standardisering och bidra till målarkitektur och välgrundade tekniska vägval. Du säkerställer också att verksamhetsbehov, information, applikationer och teknisk plattform utvecklas i ett sammanhängande och hållbart helhetsperspektiv.
  

  

En viktig del av uppdraget är att vara IT-enhetens strategiska och taktiska stöd till Socialförvaltningen. Du samverkar nära verksamheten för att omsätta behov till hållbara, digitala lösningar. Du fungerar som en sammanhållande kraft mellan Socialförvaltningen, IT-enheten, leverantörer och andra centrala funktioner.
  

  

Du får möjlighet att kombinera strategiskt arkitekturarbete med verksamhetsutveckling i en roll där ditt arbete gör konkret nytta för kommunens invånare och verksamheter.
**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------


Vi söker dig som har:
  

  

* relevant akademisk utbildning inom exempelvis system-/ datavetenskap, ingenjörsutbildning med inriktning mot IT/ teknik eller annan utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig,
* flera års erfarenhet som IT-arkitekt eller motsvarande strategisk IT-roll
* erfarenhet av verksamhetsutveckling och digitalisering
* erfarenhet av arkitekturarbete, exempelvis framtagande av målarkitektur, arkitekturprinciper, lösningsbedömningar eller tekniska vägval,
* mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska i tal och skrift.

  

Vi ser gärna att du även har:
  

  

* god förståelse för informationssäkerhet, dataskydd, integrationer, systemförvaltning och livscykelhantering,
* erfarenhet från offentlig sektor eller kommunal verksamhet,
* erfarenhet av Enterprise arkitektur, TOGAF eller annat arkitekturramverk,
* erfarenhet av processorienterat arbetssätt, exempelvis ITIL.

  

Som person är du:
  

  

* strukturerad och arbetar enligt en tydlig process, organiserar och planerar ditt arbete väl, slutför det som påbörjats och håller deadlines.
* samarbetsorienterad och arbetar bra med andra människor. Relaterar sig till dem på ett lyhört och smidigt sätt. Du kan anpassa dig och hittar win-win-lösningar genom ett prestigelöst fokus på det gemensamma målet.
* analytisk och har förmågan att förstå olika aspekter av ett problem och kan hitta ideala lösningar på ett effektivt sätt. Du löser problem utan att missa de långsiktiga strategierna. Du ser logik och samband i komplex information eller miljö.
**Anställningen**
-----------------


Typ av anställning: Tillsvidareanställning
Omfattning: Heltid
Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
**Ansökan**
-----------

---------------------


Pia Sandström

+46141225028
pia.sandstrom@motala.se

------------------------

----------
