* Erica Midfjäll, facklig representant ST, 010 475 87 31


 Du når oss också via e-post: Förnamn.Efternamn@svk.se. På grund av semestertider kan svarstiderna vara lite längre än vanligt.
   

  

 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretess-medvetenhet. Inför anställning genomförs säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) vilket innefattar grundutredning och om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om personalsäkerhet på svenska kraftnät. https://www.svk.se/sakerhet-och-beredskap/sakerhetsskydd/personalsakerhet

title: Hållbarhetsstrateg hållbara upphandlingar
description:
Tycker du som vi att det är viktigt att det du gör på dagarna bidrar till faktisk förändring? Vill du arbeta med att förverkliga Region Stockholms högt ställda miljö-och hållbarhetsmål och bidra till att vi blir ledande i Europa på hållbar upphandling? Då kan vi och regionledningskontoret vara rätt för dig!
   

  





**Om tjänsten**




 Som hållbarhetsstrateg inom miljöenheten kommer du att tillsammans med engagerade medarbetare leda, utveckla, samordna och följa upp det strategiska hållbarhetsarbetet i Region Stockholm, utifrån Region Stockholms mål om att vara ekologisk hållbar och klimatneutral till år 2035.
   

  





 Ditt huvudsakliga fokus är att operativt och strategiskt arbeta med kravställning inom miljöområdet i hela inköpsprocessen. Det innebär att utveckla och utvärdera miljökrav i de upphandlingar som sker samordnade inom regionen (i första hand inom IT och sjukvårdsmaterial), utföra uppföljningar samt vidareutveckla det strategiska hållbarhetsarbetet. Arbetet omfattar riskanalys, kravställning, leverantörsuppföljning samt att rapportera och kommunicera resultat.
   

  





 I rollen ingår att genomföra behovs- och marknadsanalyser, kravställa samt utveckla strategier för minskad miljö-och klimatpåverkan kopplat till Region Stockholms inköpskategorier och upphandlingsobjekt - i linje med regionens ambitiösa miljö -och klimatmål.
   

  





 Vidare arbetar du för att de politiska målen uppnås och att enhetens uppdrag genomförs med hög kvalitet och på ett effektivt sätt. Det är viktigt att i rollen som hållbarhetsstrateg ha ett helhetsperspektiv på alla dimensioner av hållbarhet; miljö, socialt och ekonomiskt; och ett intresse för att delta i utvecklingen av Region Stockholms samlade hållbarhetsarbete. 
   

  





 I rollen ingår du i miljöenhetens upphandlingsgrupp som arbetar med att omsätta Region Stockholms ambitiösa hållbarhetsarbete i inköps- och upphandlingsprocessen. Andra arbetsuppgifter inom miljöenhetens ansvarsområde kan komma att bli aktuella vid behov.
   

  





**Vem är du?**




 Som person har du ett strategiskt, långsiktigt tänkande och en god förmåga att omsätta strategi i praktisk handling. Du har förmåga att hantera både detaljerade och övergripande uppgifter samt bra på att se helheter och samband. Du är mål- och resultatorienterad med en förmåga att agera och prioritera i en föränderlig miljö. Du arbetar strukturerat, är självgående, prestigelös och beslutsför. Du har även en mycket god förmåga att arbeta med flera parallella uppgifter samtidigt och är bra på att hålla tidsramar. Då tjänsten har många kontaktytor förutsätter vi att du har mycket god samarbets- och kommunikativ förmåga samt att du är bekväm med att prata inför större grupper. I urvalsprocessen kommer stor vikt att läggas vid de personliga egenskaperna. 
   

  





 För att bli framgångsrik i rollen ser vi att du har:  
 


* relevant högskoleutbildning inom exempelvis miljövetenskap, samhällsvetenskap, inköp eller annan utbildningsinriktning inom för tjänsten relevant område som vi - tillsammans med erfarenheten - bedömer vara likvärdig
* flerårig arbetslivserfarenhet med att ställa miljökrav i upphandling
* kunskaper om lagen om offentlig upphandling.



 Har du dessutom kunskap om miljökrav i upphandling av entreprenad/ bygg och anläggning ser vi det som meriterande.  
   

  





 Vana att arbeta inom en politiskt styrd organisation och erfarenhet av projektledning ser vi som en fördel. 
   

  





 Du behärskar svenska språket i tal och skrift och kan uttrycka dig väl på både svenska och engelska.
   

  





**Vårt erbjudande**




 Vi har kollektivavtal och med det följer kollektivavtalade försäkringar, tjänstepension och möjlighet till löneväxling. För att du ska kunna ta ansvar för din hälsa erbjuder vi friskvårdstimme och friskvårdsbidrag samt subventionerad sjukvård i form av kostnadsfri öppensjukvård. Flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet till att arbeta hemifrån har vi för att underlätta för dig att få ihop vardagen. Här kan du läsa mer om förmånerna i vårt kollektivavtal.
   

  





 Vi sitter på Lindhagensgatan 98 i Kungsholmen, Stockholm. Hit tar du dig med lätthet med kollektivtrafik eller cykel.
   

  





**Ansökan**




 Låter det här som något för dig ser vi gärna att du söker så snart som möjligt. För en komplett ansökan räcker det med att bifoga ditt CV. När du ansöker kommer du att få besvara ett antal frågor, dessa ersätter personligt brev.
   

  





 Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta enhetschef Christoffer Nelson christoffer.nelson@regionstockholm.se
   

  





**Övrigt**




 Detta är en tillsvidareanställning med tillträde under hösten 2026. Provanställning kan komma att tillämpas vid behov. 
   

  





 Tester kan komma att ingå som steg 2 i rekryteringsprocessen. Vi använder oss av Assessios tester MAP och Matrigma. MAP är en personlighetstest och Matrigma är ett problemlösningstest som båda bygger på arbetspsykologisk forskning. Testerna används som ett komplement till dina erfarenheter och kompetenser. 
   

  





  
   

  





 Regionledningskontoret stödjer regionstyrelsen i uppgiften att leda, styra, samordna och följa upp Region Stockholms verksamheter. Förvaltningen arbetar strategiskt och operativt utifrån ett koncernperspektiv och ger regionstyrelsen de underlag och det stöd den behöver i sitt uppdrag att utveckla Region Stockholm. Regionledningskontoret ansvarar även för stöd till klimat- och regionutvecklingsnämnden samt för verksamhetsstödjande tjänster inom koncernen. Läs mer här
   

  





****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Senior Director IT
description:
Lyten is leading an industrial revolution through Lyten 3D Graphene™, a breakthrough supermaterial unlocking a new generation of products — from lithium–sulfur batteries and energy storage systems to concrete admixtures, lightweight composites, and next-generation sensors that are revolutionizing industries. Together, these innovations are making a massive global improvement and driving real-world impact across energy, mobility, construction, and defense.
   

  

 At Lyten, we believe the most meaningful careers begin with purpose — and with people who want to make a difference. We’re not just developing advanced supermaterials — we’re about to change the world as we know it, reshaping how energy is stored, how products are built, and how progress is made.
   

  

 We’re entering an exciting growth phase, scaling production across the U.S. and Europe and expanding our team of engineers, scientists, and innovators.
   

  

 Apply now to join our team and be part of something bigger than yourself — where collaboration, creativity, and purpose come together to build the technologies that will define the next century.
   

  

 Job scope
   

  

*High level purpose of function.*
 The Senior Director of IT & Security defines direction, establishes structure, and enables execution across the IT & Security function to support business objectives while ensuring alignment with group IT standards and strategy. The role empowers department leaders across Operations & Infrastructure, Business Systems, Data & AI, and Security to operate with clear ownership, autonomy, and accountability within a shared governance framework. Operating close to the business, the role ensures that technology capabilities are scalable, secure, and aligned with both regional, local, and group priorities and directions. Success in this role is measured by the strength and autonomy of the domain leadership team.
   

  

 This role carries budget responsibility and operates within a matrix structure, reporting both to local management and global IT.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 You are a people-focused leader who combines strong technical understanding with a clear and structured approach.
   

  

 You operate close to the business and are motivated by turning technology into tangible results. With a structured and data driven approach, you create clarity and direction, even in environments where structure and ways of working needs to be established. You stay informed on emerging technologies and confidently make decisions, drive initiatives forward, and handle complex situations.
   

  

 You communicate clearly, build trust across the organization, and have a natural ability to form strong relationships.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

*Overall areas of responsibilities and activities*
* Strategy & Direction Define and maintain IT & Security strategy, objectives, and roadmap aligned with business priorities and group standards
* Domain Enablement & Alignment Enable and support department managers, ensuring clear ownership, alignment, and effective collaboration across domains
* Group Alignment & Governance Ensure alignment with group IT architecture, policies, and ways of working, balancing local needs with global standards
* Technology & Transformation Drive digital and system-related transformation initiatives, ensuring scalable, integrated, and value-driven solutions
* Operations Oversight Ensure stable, secure, and efficient IT operations through clear accountability within the departments
* Financial & Vendor Management Oversee IT investments, vendor relationships, and sourcing to ensure value, cost control, and alignment with group frameworks
* Organization & Culture Build a strong, collaborative IT organization with clear accountability, fostering ownership, development, and engagement
* Stakeholder Management & Communication Maintain strong relationships with business stakeholders and group IT, ensuring transparency, alignment, and effective communication


 Accountability/Authorization
   

  

* Budget responsibility: Yes
* Direct reports: Yes
* Authorized to decide on investments according to role and policy: Yes


**Requirements**
*Educational background and previous experience required for the role.*
**Qualifications And Experience**
* Relevant academic background in Computer Science, Engineering, or similar
* Minimum 5-10 years of experience in similar senior roles, preferably in international, multi-entity and matrix environments
* Background from manufacturing or other complex, business-critical operations, preferably in multi-site setups
* Proven track record of driving global business transformation initiatives
* Experience working within group IT structures, balancing local and corporate priorities


**Specific Skills**
* Strong leadership with the ability to drive change and build high-performing teams
* Broad understanding of IT, data, enterprise architecture, and system integration
* Solid foundation in information security, risk management, and relevant regulations
* Strong business acumen with the ability to align technology with business priorities
* Experience in managing IT investments, vendors, and contracts to drive value and control cost


 Health, Safety & Environmental responsibility
   

  

* Follow company policies and procedures
* Use PPE according to safety rules
* Report hazards and incidents


**Why Work at Lyten**
 At Lyten, you’ll be part of a team that’s redefining what’s possible in energy, materials, and manufacturing. We’re not just imagining the future — we’re building it today with breakthrough technologies that are changing how products are made and how industries innovate.
   

  

 Our people are the heart of that mission. From world-class scientists and engineers to creative problem-solvers in operations, manufacturing, and commercialization, every member of the Lyten team plays a role in turning bold ideas into real-world impact. We believe that the best work happens when you’re doing great things in the world — with people you like. Collaboration, curiosity, and a shared sense of purpose drive everything we do.
   

  

 What You’ll Find at Lyten
   

  

* A mission that matters: Contribute directly to solving complex challenges in energy, mobility, and materials innovation.
* Cutting-edge innovation: Work on technologies at the intersection of materials science, energy storage, and advanced manufacturing that strengthen energy security and local supply chains.
* Extraordinary people: Join a team of talented, friendly, and down-to-earth innovators who support, challenge, and inspire one another every day.
* Teamwork and culture: Experience a workplace built on trust, respect, and shared success — where collaboration fuels breakthroughs and everyone’s ideas are heard.
* Global impact: Help scale new materials and energy solutions that reinforce industrial resilience across the U.S. and Europe.
* Career growth: Be part of a fast-moving company entering a commercial growth phase, with opportunities to lead, learn, and make your mark.
* Purpose-driven values: Thrive in an environment that celebrates ingenuity, optimism, and meaningful progress — together.


 Lyten offers the opportunity to do the most important work of your career — helping build the technologies that will power the next century of innovation.
   

  

 Join us, and help transform industries, communities, and the planet with friends who share your drive to make a difference.

title: Head of Enterprise IT
description:
**About The Role**
 We are looking for a visionary Enterprise IT Manager to lead the strategic evolution of the department. You will maintain our high standards of daily operations by managing enterprise IT systems, devices, and support services for our engineering and business teams. You will also actively pivot the organisation to focus on Engineering Enablement to create great conditions for our developers to build and ship software without friction.
   

  

**You Will Be Responsible For**
 Global Team Leadership
   

  

* Lead, mentor, and evolve a distributed team of 35 IT professionals across eight countries and multiple time zones.
* Manage six direct reports, fostering a culture of autonomy, customer service, and technical curiosity.
* Travel occasionally to our key hubs to build relationships and align operations.


 Engineering-First Strategy
   

  

* Partner with Engineering VPs and Leads to understand their pain points.
* Tilt the IT roadmap to prioritise developer efficiency—whether that means high-performance compute hardware, optimised network low-latency routes for testing, or efficient VPN solutions to make it easy to test our applications.


 Operational Excellence at Scale
   

  

* Oversee the lifecycle management of hardware, software, and mobile devices for the entire 2,000-person workforce.
* Manage corporate networks and security protocols, balancing security requirements with the flexibility engineers need to work effectively.
* Ensure our Global Service Desk provides "white glove" support to everyone from the C-suite to the Junior Dev.
* Level up the IT supplier landscape, leveraging on opportunities to consolidate and evolving IT supplier management.


**Essential Skills**
**OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:**
* You have previous success in a comparable Enterprise IT management position within a modern tech environment.
* You have experience managing managers. You know how to run a 30+ person organisation across multiple countries and time zones (EU/UK/US), focusing on strategy and unblocking your team. You know how to build culture remotely.
* You communicate proactively and strategically with Engineering VPs and business leaders to ensure IT is recognised as a strategic enabler. You focus on transparency and clarity to build trust and alignment across the wider organisation.
* You have a strong background working within or alongside software development organisations. You understand the SDLC (Software Development Life Cycle) and how IT decisions impact compile times, build speeds, and developer happiness. You understand what a compile time is and why local admin rights matter.
* You possess an excellent ability to communicate with both technical Engineering VPs and non-technical business leaders (Finance/HR).
* You have experience negotiating contracts with global hardware/software vendors and managing the logistics of hardware distribution to challenging locations.
* You have knowledge of enterprise networking, specifically tuned for a distributed workforce.
* You are versatile - you can present a budget to the CFO in the morning and dive into a complex distribution logic problem with your team in the afternoon.


 NICE TO HAVES
   

  

* Engineering background: as a SysAdmin, a DevOps engineer, or a Developer.
* A strong preference for automating onboarding, offboarding, and provisioning processes. You prefer code/scripts over manual tickets.


**Who We Are**
 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 1400 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 11 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Hybrid work policy (3 days a week in the office)
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enroll in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts


**JOIN US!**
 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
   

  

 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
   

  

**As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please**

title: AI Engineer with a passion for AI services | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Do you want to build AI services that solve real operational challenges at scale? Join SEB’s AIOps team and help shape the next generation of intelligent, reliable and secure services for a modern banking environment.
   

  

 At SEB, technology is at the heart of how we serve our customers and society. We combine the stability and responsibility of a leading bank with the curiosity, collaboration and engineering mindset of a modern tech organisation. From cloud and automation to AI and advanced analytics, you will work with an impressive technology landscape and contribute to solutions that matter. If you enjoy turning complex problems into practical, high-impact services, this could be your next challenge.
   

  

**Our Vision**
 We build intelligent AI solutions for IT Operations that make our systems self‑healing, reliable and resilient.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As an AI engineer in our AIOps team, you will help design, build, maintain and secure scalable AI services used across SEB. You will work close to real use cases, from ideas and experimentation to production-ready services that support teams across the bank.
   

  

 The work is exploratory, practical and fast-moving. Requirements are not always fully defined, so you should be comfortable navigating ambiguity, asking the right questions and turning uncertainty into progress.
   

  

 We believe in incremental progress, rapid learning and strong engineering discipline. You will contribute to a test-and-learn culture where small, well informed steps help us deliver robust solutions to complex problems.
   

  

 You will join a small, passionate team building custom AI services that already support many internal teams. Today, our AIOps platform helps detect anomalies, automates labor-intensive tasks, intelligent agent driven operations and simplifying complex searches.
   

  

 Read more here: https://sebgroup.com/career/working-at-seb/work-areas/tech-and-data/blog/2026/aiops--ai-for-it-operations
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you bring** 
 :
   

  

* A curious, analytical mindset and the motivation to solve complex problems with practical, well-engineered solutions
* Documented experience in backend development, preferably with Go and Python
* Experience working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL and MySQL
* Understanding of frontend technologies such as React.js and JavaScript
* Experience building data architectures for compute-intensive services, from ingestion to inference
* Strong knowledge of software design patterns, architecture principles and operations for microservice applications
* Understanding of container technologies and modern cloud service architecture
* Excellent collaboration skills and the ability to contribute in a small, cross-functional team
* Previous experience in AI or machine learning


**What We Offer**
* A collaborative team culture with openness, trust and room to influence
* Modern, agile ways of working with close connection to real business needs
* The opportunity to work with cutting-edge AI, automation and cloud-related technologies in a large-scale enterprise environment
* Continuous learning and development opportunities to grow your technical expertise and career


**Ready to help shape the future of AI-powered operations?**
 Attach your CV and a personal letter telling us who you are, what motivates you and how you would like to contribute to our AI journey. We review applications on an ongoing basis, so you are welcome to apply today — and no later than 2026-08-31.
   

  

 If you have questions about the position, please contact Team Manager, Benjamin Aktas, benjamin.aktas@seb.se
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment. Learn more about working at SEB at www.sebgroup.com/career

title: Workspace IT (Security)
description:
*Natural Cycles° is a leading women’s health company that developed the world’s first birth control app, used by millions globally. We are a fast growing startup, and we promote an international working environment filled with smart and ambitious colleagues based in Stockholm, Geneva, New York, and remotely. Our mission is to pioneer women’s health through research and passion, empowering every woman with the knowledge she needs to take charge of her health.* 




  





 This role is responsible for implementing and maintaining workplace-focused security controls, governance processes, and risk-reduction initiatives across employee devices and SaaS platforms. This role works with Workplace IT as the hands-on extension of the Security organization to ensure workplace technologies are secure, compliant, and appropriately governed without reducing operational effectiveness.
 



  





**Please note that we are hiring for this role in Stockholm, Sweden.** 




  





**What you will be doing** 



* Own workplace security controls, identity, and access governance across SaaS and collaboration platforms.
* E.g. in Google Workspace, JAMF (MacOS), Slack, 1Password and 1Password SaaS Manager.
* Be a process owner for evaluating employee requests to interconnect systems, AI tools etc. according to guidelines from the security team, which you will be a part of.
* Taking a balanced approach between promoting productivity and keeping the organization secure
* Support and coordinate workplace-related audit activities, maintaining policies, controls, and preparing evidence and reporting.
* Oversee security tooling (Jamf, 1Password, Google Workspace security, etc.), monitor compliance, and drive phishing investigations.
* Respond to and automate employee requests, e.g. access requests, software issues, SaaS tool issues
* Install and maintain hardware / software to monitor network activity. E.g. network scanning and honey pot



  





**What skills and experience we think you have** 



* Experience in workplace security, SaaS governance, or IT governance.
* Strong communication skills
* Understanding of identity and access management.
* Ability to balance security with operational usability.
* Nice to have:
* Prior to compliance frameworks and audit readiness.
* Experience with SaaS management platforms and vendor governance.
* Experience reviewing AI/security/privacy implications of workplace tooling.



  





**What we offer** 



* Flexible work arrangement - you will be part of a team based in and around Stockholm that values effective collaboration and transparent communication, irrespective of work location
* Professional development - you will work alongside knowledgeable colleagues in the continuous growth and skill enhancement environment
* Modern technology - you will leverage innovative technologies and tools, within an environment that empowers you to contribute ideas and take ownership of your work
* Impactful projects - you will contribute to groundbreaking projects that redefine industry standards and create tangible value
* Commitment to quality - you will join a dynamic and progressive organization that prioritizes profitable, long-term product development



  





**Location** 




 We are remote-friendly, but we find great value in being able to connect with our teams in person.
 **Most of the team you will work with is located in Sweden.** 




  





**Sounds interesting?** 




 If you want to be part of a successful team, we encourage you to apply for this position as soon as possible.
 



 We look forward to hearing from you!
 



  





**How to apply** 




 To apply, just upload your CV and answer the questions on the application form. Keep in mind that we can't accept applications through email because of GDPR, and only applications submitted via the career site (and in English) will be considered.
 



  





 At Natural Cycles we value diversity and inclusion because we know that teams with people from different backgrounds and experiences are stronger. We welcome candidates from all walks of life and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.
 



  





  





**Note: We are not looking for consultants or help from recruitment agencies**

title: Inside Sales
description:
Are you driven by sales and motivated by impact? Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment with passionate, purpose-driven colleagues?
   

  

 If you’re driven by winning new business and enjoy owning the full sales cycle - from identifying opportunities and qualifying prospects to closing deals - this could be the role for you
   

  

 You’ll connect with potential partners mostly via phone (approx. 50-60 calls per day) plus, email, SMS, social media - any channel that opens doors. Your mission is to inspire stores to join Too Good To Go and help fight food waste.
   

  

 We’ll give you the training, support, and tools to succeed. What matters most is your energy, curiosity, determination, and humility - not years of experience. Bring the right mindset, and we’ll help you build the skills, it’s down to you to apply all which you learn.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You’ll own your success by managing your pipeline and weekly activity. We provide the foundation, but your ambition, urgency, and drive will determine your results. You will do this by:
   

  

* Being the first point of contact for stores and owning the full sales process (from outreach to closing the deal). You’ll reach out to potential partners to explore how Too Good To Go can support their business.
* We’ll provide you with a longlist of leads and from there, it’s up to you to prioritise opportunities and guide prospects through the sales journey.
* You’ll be responsible for maintaining a healthy sales pipeline, supporting a smooth onboarding process, and ensuring a seamless handover to the Growth team to set new partners up for success from day one.


 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Manage opportunities with SMB, including small retailers and store chains - often involving multiple stakeholders
* Contact potential partners to understand their needs and show the value we can add.
* Learn and apply our SNAP sales methodology to effectively engage with a variety of businesses.
* Guide partners through registration and onboarding on our platform.
* Own your pipeline, using Salesforce to track and progress your opportunities
* Collaborate with the Growth team to ensure a smooth handover and onboarding experience from a partner's first day on the platform
* Take focused steps in your development, with a commitment to continuous improvement.


 Who Are You?
   

  

 You might already be working in sales, customer support, hospitality, or another customer-facing role… to us, your background is less important than your mindset.
   

  

* We’re looking for people who thrive on challenges, stay motivated when things get tough, and enjoy the process of turning a “no” into a “yes”, or a failure into a success.
* You are someone who is naturally curious, resilient, and always looking for ways to grow and push your own boundaries.
* An active listener who picks up on small cues and enjoys the challenge of creatively handling objections.
* You are someone who views feedback as a gift, proactively seeking it out to improve.
* Above all, you are passionate about working in sales!


**Our Values**
* We Win Together
* We Raise the Bar
* We Keep It Simple
* We Build A Legacy
* We Care


**Benefits**
* WORK FLEXIBLY:
+ Enjoy hybrid working from our great offices, at home (max 2 day per week) or abroad
+ Health insurance, Mindler and Pension plan
+ 25 days of statutory vacation leave
+ 5 extra days off each year
+ 3 extra Milestone leave days after 3 years of employment
+ Additional day off for significant life events
+ Enhanced Parental Leave Salary (up to 100%) for several weeks of your leave

* CELEBRATE & SOCIALISE
+ Regular social events like summer and winter parties
+ Coffee, snacks and fully-equipped kitchens
+ Get to know our community with yearly free voucher to TGTG Surprise Bags
+ Paid volunteer time through our Shareback volunteering programme
+ Women in the Workplace, P.R.I.D.E., People of Colour and Functionally Diverse Employee Resource Groups

* LOCAL BENEFITS
+ Wellness allowance.
+ Nice office with local events; breakfast on Tuesdays, candy bar on Thursdays etc.


 Recruitment Process
   

  

* Step 1 – 30 minute, virtual interview with a member of our Talent Acquisition team (via google-meet)
* Step 2 – 1 hour Role play interview + Q&A with our Sales Team lead & a member of the team. We will provide you with a preparation document but self research is highly recommended.
* Step 3 – A Final 30 minute, onsite interview with our Country Director.


 Did You Know?
   

  

 Over 40% of all food produced in the world goes to waste and it accounts for approximately 10% of global greenhouse gas emissions (That’s nearly five times more than the entire aviation industry!!)
   

  

 Today, Too Good To Go has over
 **133** 
 million users and
 **261,000** 
 active partners across 20 countries. Together, we have already saved over
 **517 million meals** 
 from going to waste.
   

  

*A Movement for Everyone*
*We want to inspire and empower everyone to fight food waste together. With that mission, it’s only natural that we want to build a diverse and inclusive team of highly capable individuals who are passionate about doing things in a better way. We strongly believe we all excel and are more creative when we’re allowed to be ourselves, and we’re committed to a culture where all of us belong.*
*We are an equal opportunity employer and all employment is decided on the basis of qualifications, merit and business need. If you need reasonable accommodation at any point in the application or interview process, please let us know.*

title: Administratör till ekonomienhet (vikariat)
description:
****Vill du bidra till en bättre hälsa för alla?****




*Söker du ett arbete där du får vara en viktig del av en verksamhet som stödjer forskning och utbildning i världsklass? Trivs du med att ge service, skapa struktur och samarbeta med andra? Då kan det här vara rollen för dig.*




*Institutionen för klinisk neurovetenskap vid Karolinska Institutet söker nu en administratör till ekonomienheten för ett vikariat. Du blir en del av den centrala administrationen som stöttar institutionens forskare, lärare och chefer i det dagliga arbetet. Här arbetar ca 25 medarbetare inom bland annat HR, ekonomi, utbildningsadministration, IT, registratur och arkiv. Här sitter även institutionens prefekt samt två forskargrupper.*




****Din roll****




 Som administratör arbetar du med löpande administrativa uppgifter med fokus på ekonomiadministration och verksamhetsstöd. Du blir en viktig kontaktperson för institutionens medarbetare och bidrar till att våra administrativa processer fungerar smidigt.
   

  





 Arbetsuppgifterna innefattar bland annat:
 


* kontroll av fakturor i faktureringssystemet samt fakturering
* administrativa kontroller och avstämningar i ekonomisystemet Agresso
* granskning av utlägg och reseräkningar i lönesystemet Primula
* förmedling av regler och policys kring resereglemente och representation
* administration kring anknutna medarbetare
* stöd och service till forskare och kollegor i administrativa frågor
* deltagande i utveckling och förbättring av administrativa arbetssätt



 Arbetet innebär både hantering av återkommande rutinartade och varierande administrativa uppgifter utifrån verksamhetens behov. Arbetet utförs i en grupp om två personer i nära samarbete med ekonomi, HR och övriga administrativa funktioner.
   

  





 Tjänsten är ett vikariat på 1 år med möjlighet till förlängning. 
   

  





****Vem är du?****




 Vi söker dig som tycker om att hjälpa andra och som trivs i en roll där du får kombinera service, administration och samarbete. Du behöver vara bekväm med att stundtals hantera stora mängder och kunna prioritera vad som behöver göras först.
   

  





 För att lyckas i rollen behöver du ha:
 


* gymnasieutbildning eller annan utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer som relevant
* god datorvana och lätt för att lära dig nya system
* erfarenhet av servicearbete eller annan roll med många kontaktytor
* flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska i tal och skrift



 Det är meriterande om du har:
 


* erfarenhet av administrativt arbete
* erfarenhet av att arbeta i olika administrativa system
* goda kunskaper i Excel
* utbildning (gymnasie eller högre) med ekonomisk inriktning



 Som person är du:
 


* serviceinriktad och samarbetsorienterad
* lösningsorienterad och ansvarstagande
* noggrann och strukturerad
* flexibel och prestigelös
* bekväm med att arbeta både med återkommande rutinuppgifter och mer varierande arbetsuppgifter



 Du tycker om att ge stöd till andra, bidrar till ett gott arbetsklimat och tar ansvar för att arbetet blir gjort med god kvalitet. Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper. 
   

  





****Vad erbjuder vi?****




 En kreativ, internationell och inspirerande miljö fylld av kompetens och nyfikenhet. Karolinska Institutet är ett av världens ledande medicinska universitet. Vår vision är att driva utvecklingen av kunskap om livet och verka för en bättre hälsa för alla. Här bedriver vi framgångsrik medicinsk forskning och har det största utbudet av medicinska utbildningar i Sverige. Som universitet är Karolinska Institutet en statlig myndighet. Det gör att du får goda förmåner genom vårt kollektivavtal. Medarbetare på KI erbjuds också möjlighet till ett flexibelt arbetssätt. Det innebär att om den verksamhet du jobbar i tillåter, så kan du arbeta en del av din arbetstid på distans. Du får även träna fritt i våra moderna friskvårdsanläggningar där utbildad personal finns på plats.  
   

  





**Placering:** 
*Solna*




 Läs mer om Institutionen för klinisk neurovetenskap här
   

  





 Tio skäl att välja Karolinska Institutet
   

  





****Ansökan****




 KI tillämpar individuell och differentierad lönesättning enligt våra kollektivavtal RALS och RALS-T. 
   

  





 Ansökan ska göras via rekryteringssystemet Varbi. I denna rekrytering söker du med ditt CV utan personligt brev. I ansökningsformuläret kommer du istället att få svara på några frågor om varför du söker jobbet. 
   

  





****Vill du göra skillnad – och bidra till en bättre hälsa för alla? Sök jobb hos oss!****

title: Engineering Manager, Stockholm
description:
Banking hasn't changed much in decades. We're changing that. One product at a time.
   

  

 Lunar is a Nordic challenger bank building the future of financial life with AI at the core. Our engineers, designers, and product people work on problems that actually matter. Making money simpler, smarter, and more rewarding for a million of registered users across the Nordics.
   

  

 Fully licensed and founded in 2015, with offices in Copenhagen, Aarhus and Stockholm.
   

  

 We move fast, we build with purpose, and we're just getting started.
   

  

 As our new Engineering Manager you'll join an engineering team based in Stockholm, working to keep the systems that power Lunar's banking products reliable, scalable, and ahead of what's next.
   

  

**What will you do?**
* Lead 1-2 cross-functional engineering teams — setting direction, removing blockers, and creating the conditions where engineers can do their best work.
* Drive technical strategy for core banking infrastructure, translating where the industry is heading into concrete decisions about how we build and ship.
* Partner with Product and other business teams to connect technical priorities directly to what matters for customers.
* Own engineering quality end-to-end — from development practices to deployment — and raise the bar on how we build reliable, scalable systems.
* Shape how AI becomes a consistent part of how your teams work, moving from ad-hoc experimentation to embedded, high-impact practice.


**What are we looking for in you?**
* 2-3 years of experience leading engineering teams, with a track record of enabling strong individual contributors and technical leads to shape direction — creating space for others to do their best thinking, not directing from above.
* Solid infrastructure expertise — you understand how systems are built, hosted, and scaled, and you've worked through the architectural trade-offs that come with it.
* Experience with hosting cost optimisation and the decisions that drive infrastructure spend up or down.
* A working understanding of how data and AI intersect in a modern engineering org, and what it takes to build teams that use AI tools effectively.
* Comfortable setting direction when the landscape is shifting, and able to bring your team along.


**What You Get**
* 4 days in the office, 1 day working from home. We're a team that builds together, thinks together, and moves together. Showing up is part of how we work.
* State of the art equipment. The newest computer, monitor, mouse, and keyboard. We want you to do your best work without anything slowing you down.
* Pension, health insurance, and enhanced parental leave. From your financial future to your family moments. We've got you covered.


**Are you ready to join the journey? Apply now and let's find out more!**
 While you hold on tight for us to get back to you, curious to see what we’re up to? Follow us on LinkedIn for business announcements and releases 📢, check out our Instagram for an inside scoop on what it’s like to work here .
   

  

*Depending on the regulations in the country where you will be employed, we will ask to see or obtain information about your criminal record.*
*We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds. If you need any adjustments during the recruitment process, please let us know*

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Development at Nolimit City (part of Evolution AB) is a challenging and exciting role where you will be part of a team dedicated to creating solutions that redefine our industry. By working in small, highly collaborative teams, you and your team will have clear ownership of one of our most important new initiatives.
   

  

 At Nolimit City, we optimize for quality, fast flows, and iterative development with short feedback loops. We have a strong focus on end-to-end ownership, continuous improvement, monitoring, and experimentation. We strive to have teams that are inclusive, helpful, and have a strong sense of ownership for what they build. Our engineers make some of the most significant decisions for the company, and we are looking for open and curious developers. As part of the Nolimit City team, you will be part of one of Sweden's fastest-growing companies and contribute to creating value for our players worldwide.
   

  

 We are expanding several of our engineering teams, including the team working on new initiatives with innovative products for our end users and work on our core products.
   

  

 Although we prefer that you're working on-site we also undertand that you have a life outside of work, meaning that working remote from time to time, leaving early, coming in late etc is not something unusual for us. A bit of a cliche; but we do in fact offer a great deal of freedom but with that comes responsibility.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

* Own the product from start to finish. Decide how it is best built, tested, deployed, and monitored.
* Work with large-scale, highly available, and robust modern systems.
* Be an integral part of a team and its culture and ways of working.
* Work with automated deployment enabling release multiple times a day.
* Succeed, fail, and learn together with other competent and talented people. We believe in an environment that offers growth opportunities and see education as a result of failure that brings us closer to the next breakthrough.
* Take responsibility for system design, work together with domain architects, own end-to-end problems, manage stakeholder communication, and mentor junior engineers.


 Who you are
   

  

* Tech stack should include: JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java.
* Experience with advanced JavaScript libraries and frameworks
* Experience with APIs and product development
* A passion for writing clear and sustainable code
* Experience with agile methodologies, continuous integration, continuous delivery
* Good spoken and written English skills
* You thrive in an environment where you are responsible for your code and takes ownership of the change from editor to production system
* We understand that you might not have experience in all the areas listed above, but as long as you have the ambition and willingness to learn we would like to hear from you.


 Some of our technologies
   

  

* Javascript / TypeScript
* React / NextJS
* Redux / Redux-Toolkit Query
* Strapi (Headless CMS)
* Node.js and Express.js
* Java 17, Dropwizard
* MySQL
* PostgreSQL
* AWS, Ubuntu, Docker, GitHub Actions


 Who we are
   

  

 We are the best and fastest growing slot provider in the world with the operator and product in focus, and the mobile future on our minds. Nolimit is a team of experienced professionals from the gambling industry in Stockholm, Sweden, Malta and Gurugram, India. Our company has derived from hands on work at some of the most successful gambling software providers and operators over the last 15 years. Our mission is to offer a fast, reliable and flexible team that cooperates with the best operators in the world, taking gambling to the next level.
   

  

 We have a clean code high performance modern mini/micro service portable system platform for mobile and desktop that is 100 % under our own control. Since we have our own platform, this allows us to deliver special features and smooth, customizable marketing campaigns that are tailored to the operator's specific needs. We think it's time for a new angle to the gambling software industry – one where the product is in focus and we fully engage their promotion, marketing and country manager system/activities with our games. Nolimit work with customers on a global scale and the largest gambling operators in the world have our games everywhere.
   

  

 Nolimit City, Stockholm based development team. We provide you with your choice of OS and IDE.
   

  

 Send your application to hr-sweden@nolimitcity.com
   

  

 http://www.nolimitcity.com

title: Operational Threat Intelligence Analyst to CSIRT | SEB, Solna
description:
SEB is more than just a bank with a technology function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From COBOL to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.
   

  

 My name is Henrik Brevenius, and I lead the CSIRT and Operational Threat Intelligence team at SEB. We are currently looking to expand our team with a new Operational Threat Intelligence Analyst.
   

  

**About The Job**
 The OSC (Operational Security Center) department consists of several functions, including Security Incident Response (CSIRT), Threat Intelligence, Penetration Testing, Vulnerability Management, and Security Engineering.
   

  

 You will work on the defensive side of operational IT security, focusing on Threat Intelligence, Threat Hunting and Incident Response.
   

  

**Primary responsibilities:**
* As a Threat Intelligence Analyst, you will help produce actionable operational and tactical threat intelligence insights that are relevant to SEB Group.
* Your work will support immediate and near-term security operations by identifying and addressing emerging cyber threats.
* Collaborate with the strategic threat intelligence team.
* Identify critical security questions and provide actionable recommendations based on threat intelligence insights.
* Maintain operational situational awareness to detect potential threats and vulnerabilities impacting SEB.
* Monitor indicators of data breaches or attacks on SEB and its third parties.
* Collaborate closely with CSIRT and management during incidents to ensure appropriate actions are taken and validated.
* Offer support in Incident Response and Security Engineering, providing in-depth analysis of how threat actors may impact SEB's IT infrastructure.
* Conduct Threat Hunting.
* Foster collaboration with partners, vendors, and other critical sectors regarding Threat Intelligence.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement and development of our Incident Response and Threat Intelligence services.


**Who are we looking for?**
* We are seeking team members who bring a diverse range of experiences and perspectives to SEB
* You are an experienced and inspiring team member with a strong security background, particularly in cybersecurity, with experience in threat analysis and/or intelligence analysis.
* You understand the value of intelligence-driven approaches to support security operations and can translate your insights into practical outcomes.
* You are thorough, analytical, and able to communicate effectively with different stakeholders.
* We value integrity, a collaborative spirit, and a positive attitude in our team, as we continuously work together to strengthen SEB’s security.
* You possess a positive attitude, high integrity, and the ability to foster cooperation in the continuous and collective tasks needed to strengthen SEB's security.
* In general, we seek someone with a solid technical IT security background, a deep understanding of the entire cybersecurity field, and the ability to relate it to known and emerging threats. Alternatively, a fast learner with analytical mindset with interest in growing into the Cybersecurity field.


**Skills/Qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree (BA/BS) in Computer Science or a related field
* Understanding of threat intelligence frameworks such as MITRE ATT&CK and the Cyber Kill Chain
* Knowledge of the methodology and mindset of modern cyber threat actors and the cyber threat intelligence lifecycle
* Fluency in Swedish and English


**Desirable Skills**
* Professional qualifications such as GCTI, CTIA, CISSP, CISA, CISM certifications is an advantage
* Understanding of industry regulations, standards, and best practices such as FI FFFS, NIST, ISO 27001, DORA, and PCI-DSS
* Practical experience in developing intelligence-driven threat scenarios
* Experience in automation and data visualization
* Security Engineering
* Tooling and scripting


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-08-30. If you have questions about the position, please contact Hiring Manager Henrik Brevenius at henrik.brevenius@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Head of Engineering - Campaign & Rewards
description:
A great opportunity has come up at
 **Betsson Group** 
 .  We are now looking for a
 **Head of Engineering for our Campaigns & Rewards Area.** 



**The Wow** 

 As the Head of Engineering - Campaigns & Rewards, you will provide leadership for our engineering teams working on our Gaming product vertical. You will be accountable for the delivery, in terms of both time and quality, of all engineering teams working in the domain. You will work closely with your product counterparts on executing the roadmap, whilst driving technical excellence in terms of code quality, stability, scalability, and security.
 



  
 


**A taster of what you will be involved with** 
* Build and lead a high performing, top class engineering organisation covering multiple teams, setting out proper strategies towards this goal.
* Support, mentor and coach the engineering managers and leads.
* Collaborate with the architecture team and actively support their direction to drive the technical vision and enable the future state architectural design of the domain.
* Work closely with your product counterparts to develop, support and execute on product roadmaps and towards shared goals.
* Champion technical initiatives for consideration in the product development roadmap.
* Maintain a deep understanding of the gaming industry, performing competitor analysis, staying up-to-date with trends, emerging technologies.
* Foster a culture of innovation, continuous improvement, and collaboration within the team, promoting best practices in software engineering and agile methodologies.
* Drive the delivery of initiatives across the teams, ensuring that we are maximising the potential of our people and their delivery.
* Ensure the platform's reliability, security, and scalability by proactively addressing potential risks and performance bottlenecks.
* Manage engineering budgets, resources, and timelines effectively, delivering projects on time and within scope.
* Develop and implement metrics and KPIs to monitor platform performance, driving data-driven decision-making and improvements.
* Identify and address technical and process bottlenecks.
* Set an example in taking responsibility and ownership, which may also mean stepping into any missing role as and when may be required.



  
 


  
 **What we are looking for** 
* Highly experienced in building and leading high performing engineering teams, with at least 2 years’ experience in a senior / strategic engineering leadership role.
* A strong background in software engineering, preferably having 10+ years’ experience working in engineering roles.
* Demonstrated experience in nurturing and coaching engineering leaders.
* Passionate
 

 about technology and how it can enable business growth and opportunities, in particular in how it satisfies user needs.
* Experience and understanding of agile practices and techniques for developing products.
* Confident working in a complex technical environment with hands-on experience working with highly available and high load transactional systems, with the ability to drive focus on performance, scalability and security.
* Experience in defining OKRs and KPIs, working with data to understand system(s) performance and the outcomes of product development.
* Proven ability to lead analyses and evaluations for complex decisions.
* Experience with cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP is a plus.



  
 


**Good to have** 
* Relevant working experience in the gaming industry.
* Experience working with remote / geographically distributed
 

 teams.
* Familiarity with AI/ML technologies for personalised experiences.
* Experience in working with and managing third-party suppliers.
* A humble and inspirational leader who leads by example and fosters a culture of ownership and collaboration.
* Strong organisational, planning and project management skills.
* Excellent verbal & written communication skills, with the ability to explain technical topics to non-technical stakeholders.
* Excellent presentation skills, with the ability to present effectively to C-Level.
* Professional working proficiency in Swedish and English.


  
 **What we offer** 

 Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: Digitaliserings- och IT-chef till SHIS Bostäder
description:
Vill du använda digitalisering som ett verktyg för att skapa nytta, kvalitet och hållbara resultat i en organisation med ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag?
 



  





 Som Digitaliserings- och IT-chef på SHIS får du en nyckelroll i att utveckla verksamhetens arbetssätt, systemstöd och digitala förmåga.
 



  





**Om SHIS Bostäder** 




 SHIS Bostäder är en stiftelse och Stockholms stads bostadssociala resurs. I nära samarbete med stadens stadsdelsförvaltningar och socialförvaltningen erbjuder vi olika boendelösningar och behovsanpassat stöd för stockholmare som av sociala eller ekonomiska skäl har hamnat utanför den vanliga bostadsmarknaden.
 



  





 På SHIS arbetar cirka 240 engagerade medarbetare med olika bakgrund och kompetens som går till jobbet med målet att hjälpa våra hyresgäster till ett eget, självständigt boende.
 



 Vi har i dag cirka 3 200 lägenheter i ett 30-tal fastigheter runt om i Stockholm.
 



  





**Anställnings- och uppdragsbeskrivning** 




 Anställningen är en tillsvidareanställning, tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
 



 Din primära arbetsplats kommer att vara på SHIS nyrenoverade huvudkontor, lokaliserat vid Södra station på Södermalm med närhet till pendeltåg, buss och tunnelbana.
 



  





**Uppdraget** 




 Uppdraget som Digitaliserings- och IT-chef är både strategiskt och operativt. Du driver digital verksamhetsutveckling och förändringsarbete samtidigt som du skapar förutsättningar för innovation och effektiva arbetssätt.
 



  





 Tillsammans med en arbetsgrupp om åtta medarbetare håller du ihop SHIS digitala verksamhetsutveckling, transformation och leverans av verksamhetsstödjande IT-tjänster och processer.
 



  





 En viktig del av uppdraget är att bidra till en smartare och kvalitetssäkrad organisation. Digitaliseringen ska stödja stiftelsens bostadssociala uppdrag och skapa bättre förutsättningar för medarbetare, boende, uppdragsgivare och samverkansparter.
 



  





 I rollen ingår att:
 


* Leda och fördela ansvar för att enhetens arbete effektivt, utvecklings- och målfokuserat ska omsättas i konkreta resultat
* Säkerställa drift, förvaltning och utveckling av SHIS centrala och lokala verksamhetssystem, datakommunikation, digitala arbetsplats och andra IT-tjänster
* Samordna behovsfångst, kravställning, systemutveckling och uppföljning gentemot stiftelsens avdelningar och enheter
* Utveckla och tillämpa arbetssätt för systemförvaltning, projektstyrning, prioritering och uppföljning
* Facilitera styrande forum där digital verksamhetsutveckling, prioriteringar och gemensam framdrift står i fokus



  





 I rollen ingår även att:
 


* Driva IT-strategiska frågor, riktlinjer och policys
* Ansvara för diarieföring, informationshantering, GDPR, dataskydd och informationssäkerhet
* Säkerställa att IT-verksamheten följer tillämpliga strategier, riktlinjer, lagar och förordningar



  





**Kvalifikationer** 




 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* akademisk utbildning inom exempelvis IT, systemvetenskap eller ekonomi med IT-inriktning, alternativt annan utbildning eller erfarenhet som vi bedömer likvärdig
* flera års erfarenhet som chef med personal-, budget-, arbetsmiljö- och verksamhetsansvar
* flera års erfarenhet av digital förändringsledning eller projektledning
* flera års erfarenhet av drift, förvaltning och utveckling av IT-tjänster
* erfarenhet av att leda strategisk och operativ digital verksamhetsutveckling
* förmåga att identifiera, integrera och utveckla digitala lösningar som skapar verksamhetsnytta och stärker organisationens erbjudande.



  





 Du har även erfarenhet av:
 


* leverantörsstyrning
* IT-drift i både egen miljö och hos externa leverantörer
* Microsofts plattformar, exempelvis Microsoft 365 och Azure
* offentlig upphandling och upphandlingsprocesser, inklusive kunskap om lagen om offentlig upphandling, LOU
* systemförvaltning, systemutveckling och etablerade arbetssätt för styrning och uppföljning av IT
* informationssäkerhet, GDPR, offentlighetsprincipen och sekretesslagstiftning
* arbete med riktlinjer, policys och styrande dokument inom IT och digitalisering.



  





**Personliga förmågor och sociala egenskaper** 




 Du är
 **utvecklingsorienterad och strategisk** 
 med förmåga att se helheten. Du drivs av att utveckla arbetssätt, processer och digitala lösningar och ser digitalisering som en naturlig del av verksamhetsutvecklingen. Du kan omsätta långsiktiga mål och prioriteringar till konkreta aktiviteter som skapar verksamhetsnytta.
 



  





 Du har ett
 **verksamhetsnära och resursmedvetet förhållningssätt** 
 och förstår hur digitala lösningar kan stärka verksamhetens processer och bidra till ökad nytta för boende, uppdragsgivare, samverkansparter och medarbetare.
 



  





 Du är
 **strukturerad och lösningsorienterad** 
 med god förmåga att analysera komplexa frågor, prioritera effektivt och följa upp arbetet mot uppsatta mål. Du planerar både kort- och långsiktigt och hittar framkomliga lösningar även när förutsättningarna förändras.
 



  





 Som ledare är du
 **trygg, tydlig och kommunikativ** 
 . Du skapar engagemang och delaktighet, ger medarbetare goda förutsättningar att lyckas och vågar fatta beslut när det behövs. Du har hög integritet, god samarbetsförmåga och kan på ett pedagogiskt sätt förklara komplexa frågor för olika målgrupper.
 



  





**Vi erbjuder dig** 




 Vi ser till alla människors lika värde, värderar varje anställds enskilda kompetens och tillämpar individuell och differentierad lönesättning enligt kollektivavtalet BÖK Fastigheter.
 



  





**Förmåner** 



* Friskvårdsbidrag och friskvårdstimme
* Företagshälsovård
* Förskottssemester
* Föräldralön
* Partiell nedtrappningsförmån
* Semesterväxling
* Tjänstepension



  





**Rekryteringsprocessen** 




 Stockholms stad arbetar med kompetensbaserad rekrytering som syftar till att se till varje persons kompetens och därmed motverka diskriminering.
 



  





 I rekryteringsprocessen ska du vara beredd på att uppvisa underlag som intygar nedan:
 


* Rätten att arbeta i Sverige
* Din utbildning och rollens krav på dokumenterad erfarenhet
* Belastningsregister, endast i det fall du erbjuds anställningen



  





**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Marketing & Community Coordinator
description:
Align Sweden is building a leading network at the intersection of
 **AI, business, and societal change** 
 . We’re looking for a
 **junior, part-time generalist** 
 who likes to get things done and learn fast. It's a part-time (up to 50%) role that will quickly shift to full-time if it suits your schedule. We're also open for students, part-time parents or people who simply want to be part of an exciting workplace and movement.
 



  





 It's an advantage if you bring experiences in marketing (graphical content, text, video editing, social selling), administrative coordination (e-mails, follow-up, calendar management) and/or light tech use (AI services, web admin, SaaS-services). But most of all, you are eager to learn and deliver. If you're "AI-native", it's very advantageous. Extra benefit if you have experience in professional photography, events coordination, marketing and/or AI or CxO communities.
 



  





 Swedish language, strong social skills and on-site availability in Stockholm is an advantage. This is not a behind-the-scenes job, it's a very active role supporting the operations of a high-impact professional ecosystem.
 



  





**You will:** 



* Create and publish content (text, simple video, AI-generated content).
* Use AI tools daily for research, content, and creative writing.
* Support sales and growth (follow-ups, outreach, structure).
* Support our members and community leaders (answering questions, onboarding, co-hosting events).
* Help keep inboxes, leads, and loose ends under control.
* Other operational tasks as required from time-to-time.



  





**You are:** 



* Hands-on, curious, and comfortable stepping into multiple roles and tasks.
* Interested in AI, tech, and the future of work.
* Early in your career, or possibly a student looking for real-world experience.



  





**This role is:** 



* Practical, fast-moving, and close to real decisions.
* A great learning opportunity in applied AI and growth.
* A stepping stone to a significant contribution for a leading AI organization in Sweden (within or outside of Align).



  





**This role is not:** 



* A purely administrative job.
* A heavy strategy role.



  





 It's something in-between everything, where you will truly be in the center of everything, in a fast-moving environment amongst some of the most senior and relevant AI leaders in Sweden. You need to be a self-starter, and care about quality.
 



  





 You will be a valued team member, and given access to prestigious events and fully-tooled to do a great job.

title: Internship - Business Development
description:
*Are you looking for a place where ambition meets real impact? Do you have a strong analytical mindset? Are you eager to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced startup environment? Continue your growth at Grale - an award-winning green tech company redefining sustainable solutions.*
*Now, we’re expanding our team and looking for a driven* 
***Business Development Intern***
*. At Grale, you’ll have the chance to work closely with our core team on high-impact projects - with the opportunity to learn, grow and contribute.*
**Role Description**
 As an intern at Grale, you’ll become an integral part of our passionate, high-performing team. You’ll work closely with our founders and core team on real, strategic projects across business analysis, fundraising, and market expansion - from driving market research to building investment strategies and outreach to support growth.
   

  

 You’ll be part of shaping Grale’s future while developing your skills in business analysis, investor engagement, and sustainability-driven growth.
   

  

**Main responsibilities include, but are not limited to:**
* Support fundraising processes, including investor research, outreach, and pipeline management
* Assist in preparing materials (pitch decks, financial narratives, data rooms)
* Support investment evaluation and outreach processes.
* Conduct market and competitor analysis to support strategic decision-making.
* Drive research and insights initiatives across key markets and segments.
* Contribute to the development and execution of business and partnership strategies.
* Maintain and expand key stakeholder relations, coordinate meetings and materials for external stakeholders.
* Prepare and refine presentations, reports, and strategic documentation.
* Collaborate across teams to align on priorities and ensure smooth execution.
* Provide general operational and strategic support across the organization.


**What you bring:**
* Studies within business, economics or analytical fields - such as Stockholm School of Economics or KTH
* Strong analytical ability and entrepreneurial mindset with genuine interest in business development, startups and investor engagement.
* Comfortable navigating a fast-paced, constantly evolving environment.
* Excellent communication skills in Swedish and English


**We also see that you:**
* Are self-driven and thrive in fast-paced environments.
* Can handle multiple priorities and remain structured under pressure.
* Are solution-oriented, resourceful, and eager to take ownership.
* Have a natural curiosity and drive to learn across business areas.


**What you get:**
* A front-row seat to scaling one of Europe's most exciting ClimateTech startups.
* High ownership and steep learning curve from day one.
* Work alongside Grales founders: serial-entrepreneurs with exit and IPO experience, featured on Forbes 30 under 30 and awarded Prince Daniel Fellowship
* Modern office in central Stockholm
* Wellness benefits, breakfast and regular team activities


 At Grale, we are proud to foster an inclusive workplace free from discrimination. We strongly believe that diversity of experience, perspectives, and background will lead to a better environment for our employees and a better product.
   

  

**About Grale:**
*Imagine a world free from microplastics where our planet thrives. At Grale, we’re not just imagining it - we’re building it. Plastics are made from petroleum and remain in our environment for thousands of years, while microplastics have already found their way into our oceans, food, and even our bodies. By 2050, there could be more plastic than fish in the sea. We’re here to change that - and we’re looking for passionate people to join us.*
*🏆 Grale has been awarded Global Tech Innovator - selected among 2,000 technology companies worldwide*
*🥇 Grale has been named the Sweden’s winner of “Nordic Innovation Award 2026” by Swedish patent office (PRV)*
*🏆 Ranked #31 on the Sifted 250: Fastest growing startups in Europe 2025*
*🥇 Awarded the World’s Most Innovative Sustainability Startup - selected from 1,400 companies globally*
**Interested?**
 We are interviewing continuously with the aim of filling the position as soon as possible. Apply today to join a team shaping a sustainable future! 🌱
   

  

 The internship is unpaid full time and typically lasts for 6 months, but we can adapt the scope and duration based on your needs and performance. Starting late august or beginning of september.

title: SAP Specialist
description:
**Engineering Manager – SAP Master Data** 




**SAP S/4HANA** 




  





 We're working with a leading organisation undergoing a significant SAP S/4HANA transformation and are looking for an experienced Engineering Manager – SAP Master Data to lead a high-performing SAP team while driving the future of enterprise master data management.
 



  





 This is an excellent opportunity for someone who combines strong technical SAP Master Data expertise with proven people leadership, stakeholder management, and delivery experience.
 



  





**The Role** 




  





 You'll lead a team responsible for delivering scalable, high-quality SAP Master Data solutions across a complex enterprise environment. Working closely with business stakeholders, architects, product teams, and third-party partners, you'll own delivery, improve data governance, and help shape the organisation's SAP roadmap.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





 ✅ Lead, mentor and develop a high-performing SAP Master Data team
 



 ✅ Own the successful delivery of SAP Master Data projects and production support
 



 ✅ Drive SAP S/4HANA transformation and master data initiatives
 



 ✅ Establish and improve data governance, quality standards and best practices
 



 ✅ Work closely with senior business stakeholders to align technology with business goals
 



 ✅ Manage delivery priorities, resources, risks and dependencies
 



 ✅ Promote Agile delivery, operational excellence and continuous improvement
 



 ✅ Oversee integrations between SAP and wider enterprise applications
 



 ✅ Manage external vendors and strategic technology partners
 



 ✅ Identify automation opportunities and leverage modern technologies to improve efficiency
 



  





**What We're Looking For** 




  





 Strong leadership experience managing SAP functional and technical teams
 



 Extensive SAP Master Data Management experience
 



 Strong SAP ECC and SAP S/4HANA knowledge
 



 Experience supporting SAP transformation or migration programmesKnowledge of Retail Master Data (Products, Vendors, Customers, Locations, Supply Chain)
 



 Data Governance and Data Quality expertise
 



 Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
 



 Experience working within Agile delivery environments
 



 Ability to lead strategic initiatives while remaining delivery focused

title: Infrastructure Engineer to Mainframe Integration - Swedbank
description:
Are you interested to work with one of Swedbank’s core platforms?
   

  

 In Swedbank you have the opportunity to:
   

  

* Join a World-Class Mainframe Environment.
* Work with a highly interesting and technically challenging platform.
* Unleash your technical curiosity and passion.
* Contribute to improve complex, mission-critical systems.
* Grow and develop alongside highly skilled colleagues.


 If you enjoy solving intricate problems and working in an environment that values innovation and collaboration, this is the place for you.
   

  

 What is needed in this role:
   

  

* Master’s degree in information systems and/or equivalent work experience.
* Highly skilled in MQ on z/OS and and a great benefit if you have good knowledge in IMS (including DL/1) in and IBM Integration Bus as well.
* We believe that you are structured, proactive, enjoys troubleshooting, analysing problems, and finding solutions and thrive in environments where reliability and precision are critical.
* Deploy releases and handle configuration and change activities across environments. Perform lifecycle management, including upgrades and version testing.
* Act as a subject matter expert (SME) for system behavior and integrations.
* You are comfortable collaborating with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders.
* Participate in Agile planning, prioritization, and delivery activities
* Very good communication skills in English (both written and verbal).


 With us, you can experience:
   

  

* Personal and professional growth through self-leadership and continuous development.
* Meaningful work that positively impacts our workplace, our customers, and society.
* An open and collaborative culture that encourages cross-functional teamwork and provides networking opportunities.
* A supportive and inclusive environment that promotes a balanced and sustainable work-life, with flexible working conditions when suitable for the role.
* Benefits such as our share based reward program Eken, company pension plan, employee offer for banking products, health insurance.


 "Join our team and...
   

  

 become part of a team of professional colleagues, who work together to deliver challenging projects, stable and secure operations and by that contribute to Swedbank's position in society."
 **Cecilia Kåhrström, your future leader**
 We look forward to receiving your application by 07.08.2026.
   

  

**Location: Stockholm**
**Recruiting manager: Cecilia Kåhrström**
**We may begin the selection during the application period, so we welcome your application as soon as possible.**
*We have made our choice regarding recruitment media and therefore kindly decline contact with ad sellers or sellers of other recruitment services.*
 Employment in this position may involve placement in a security class or, alternatively, a security screening without placement in a security class. Therefore, a security assessment with a background check may be conducted in accordance with the Security Protection Act (2018:585).
   

  

**Swedbank does not discriminate anybody based on gender, age, sexual orientation or sexual identity, ethnicity, religion or disability – everybody is welcome.**

title: Systemadministratör inom Dataplattform
description:
**Sista ansökningsdatum: 4 september** 




 I takt med att vår IT-division på Svenska kraftnät växer ökar även enhetens uppdrag och Data- och rapportplattformen är och kommer att bli en allt viktigare del i Svenska kraftnäts satsning inom dataområdet. Vi söker en
 **Systemadministratör** 
 inom
 **Dataplattform** 
 som vill vara med på Svenska kraftnäts datadrivna resa genom att förvalta och vidareutveckla våra dataplattformar som verkligen gör skillnad för hela verksamheten.
 



  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Här blir du en del av enheten Dataanalys och dataplattform, som ansvarar för att tillhandahålla plattformar för lagring, analys och delning av data för att möjliggöra en säker och effektiv användning av data och information på hela myndigheten. Enheten svarar på frågor och beställningar om strukturerad data, exempelvis datauttag och publicerade rapporter.
 



 På enheten arbetar ett engagerat team bestående av 20 medarbetare med kompetens inom dataanalys, backend- och frontendutveckling samt IT-specialister som hanterar arkitektur, applikationsdrift och support för våra plattformar. Vi arbetar tvärfuktionellt enligt agila principer tillsammans med förvaltningsledare och produktägare med både förvaltning och vidareutveckling.
 



  





 I din roll som Systemadministratör kommer du att arbeta med förvaltning, drift och vidareutveckling av våra dataplattformar för Analytics. Du ansvarar för att dataplattformen fungerar optimalt och säkerställer att viktiga rapporter och analyser förses med korrekt data i rätt tid. Du ser även till att Hadoop/Cloudera-plattformen utvecklas för att kunna ta emot ännu mer data, bl.a. från nya datakällor.
 



 Tjänsten kommer även att innefatta:
 


* Arbete med hantering av databaser, t.ex. SQL Server
* Arbete med anslutning av nya datakällor, felsökning, uppdateringar och uppgraderingar samt övervakning och även utveckling av dataflöden
* Att föreslå tekniska lösningar och proaktivt förbättra plattformen
* Att agera bollplank för olika intressenter t.ex. i samband med framtagande av nya IT-lösningar



  





 En viktig del av rollen framåt är att tillsammans med övriga i teamet arbeta med att vidareutveckla befintlig datalake för att strukturera, förenkla och effektivisera arbetet med att hämta och använda data.
 



 I rollen blir du en nyckelperson i att driva Svenska kraftnäts datadrivna utveckling och stärka verksamhetens förmåga att använda data som grund för beslut och insikter. Här får du goda möjligheter att påverka arbetssätt och lösningar inom givna ramar för verksamheten.
 



  





**Om dig** 




**Skallkrav:** 




 Vi söker dig som gillar systemadministration, Linux, lagring, prestanda, byggande av kluster, pipelines för bearbetning av data samt övervakning och larmsättning – med målet att både servrar och användare ska vara lyckliga dagarna i ända. Du har ett strukturerat och analytiskt arbetssätt och navigerar lätt i komplexa miljöer. Att omsätta behov till robusta, säkra och välfungerande tekniska lösningar som skapar nytta i verksamheten motiverar dig, samtidigt som du gärna håller dig uppdaterad om den tekniska utvecklingen. Som person är du stabil och flexibel och trivs i en föränderlig miljö och du har lätt för att anpassa dig till både uppgift och tempo. Du kan kommunicera på olika nivåer, uppskattar samarbete och att åstadkomma resultat tillsammans med andra. Du är samtidigt framåtlutad, tar egna initiativ och kan självständigt driva ditt arbete framåt. Du ska också leva upp till
 **den statliga värdegrunden.** 
 I denna rekrytering lägger vi stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
