title: Cortex Cloud Sales Specialist
description:
Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden Sales Ref ID: JR-019469  

**Our Mission**


At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.


**Who We Are**


In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!


This role is remote, but distance is no barrier to impact. Our hybrid teams collaborate across geographies to solve big problems, stay close to our customers, and grow together. You will be part of a culture that values trust, accountability, and shared success where your work truly matters.
**Job Summary**


We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Sales Specialist to drive the growth of our Cortex and Cloud business. The ideal candidate will operate in a high-growth environment, have a solid background in cybersecurity sales, and a deep understanding of security solutions. This role requires a strategic thinker who excels in collaboration, engages effectively with customers, and drives revenue growth through the sale of complex solutions.


### **Key Responsibilities**


* Build and cultivate strong customer relationships with CIOs and CISOs, driving business growth and strategic alignment within the region.
* Partner with the core sales team and channel partners to align customer strategies and engagements with Cortex and Cloud business objectives.
* Take full ownership of leading strategic sales campaigns and sales forecasting, utilizing in-depth knowledge of complex sales cycles.
* Translate complex technical cybersecurity solutions into clear business value propositions for customers during deep technical discussions.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including sales engineers and alliances, to provide tailored, customer-centric solutions and develop joint strategies.
* Proactively collaborate and exchange information with internal teams to accomplish shared objectives and ensure customer success.
* Travel domestically as needed to meet with customers and attend key business events to foster relationships and close opportunities.

**Qualifications**

* 5+ years of field sales experience focusing on key customer accounts and delivering value to Enterprise or Major-level accounts.
* Extensive platform selling experience in complex sales with multiple buying centers.
* Established trusted relationships with CIOs and CISOs with the ability to influence and drive strategic conversations.
* Expertise in applying complex solution sales methodologies to drive results.
* Willingness to travel domestically as necessary to meet business needs.

### **Preferred Qualifications**


* Experience selling Cybersecurity, SIEM, EDR, or CNAPP (DevSecOps, CloudOps) solutions.
* Experience working with channel partners and a deep understanding of a channel-centric go-to-market strategy.
* Demonstrated ability to thrive in a fast-paced, high-growth environment while collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams.
* Experience operating in a continuous adoption, expansion, and upsell sales motion within a matrixed sales organization.

**Our Commitment**

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.


We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.


Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.


All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.


Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.
company_description: Your career will have a global impact: one that protects our way of life in the digital age by preventing successful cyberattacks.

title: Incident & Operations Engineer III
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
  
Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
  
At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!
  
DESCRIPTION
  
We are looking for an Incident & Operations Engineer III to join our Technical Operations Center team in Kalmar. In this role, you will regularly act as the technical lead or incident commander for severity 1&2 incidents. Diagnoses complex issues across microservices and network routing independently. Lead blameless Post-Implementation Reviews, recommending as well as implementing long-term operational improvements. Additionally, you will play a key role in supporting our operator and provider partners to maintain high-quality service delivery.
  
We tackle every challenge together as a team, sharing the workload no matter how complex it gets! With our 24/7 operations, we are dedicated to resolving incidents swiftly and keeping business disruptions to an absolute minimum. To help us maintain this high standard of service, your day-to-day responsibilities will include:
  
Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth resolution of issues and improved ways of working.
  
Conduct in-depth troubleshooting at both the software and network layers to identify and resolve technical problems.
  
Act as the technical lead and incident commander for our core services during incidents.
  
Monitor the health of our global infrastructure and ensure incidents are managed and escalated as needed.
  
Document and track alerts and incidents for future improvements.
  
Leads blameless Post-Implementations Reviews. Partners directly with platform/software engineering teams to implement structural fixes and optimization.
  
Transitions manual procedural tasks into automated workflows.
  
  

REQUIREMENTS
  
Sinch is a tech company through and through where great ideas are listened to and often implemented - we want you to feel part of the bigger picture!
  
This role is full of challenges and offers plenty of opportunities to grow. To thrive here, you’ll need a curious mindset and a passion for learning. A “can-do” attitude will help you turn obstacles into opportunities and keep you moving forward.
  
**Education:** A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related technical field (or equivalent professional experience).
  
**Communication:** Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with the ability to explain technical issues clearly to both internal teams and external partners.
  
**Problem-Solving:** Strong analytical skills and a methodical approach to troubleshooting software or system alerts.
  
**Composure:** The ability to stay calm and focused in a high-pressure environment, especially when managing multiple tasks or urgent incidents.
  
**Flexibility:** Ability to work in a 24/7 shift rotation, including nights and weekends.
  
**Location:** Able to work onsite at our office in Kalmar, Sweden.
  
  

In addition to the above, it is a strong advantage if you have:
  
Hands-on experience with incident management and platform monitoring.
  
Understanding of network fundamentals such as TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/S, and BGP.
  
Experience collaborating effectively with internal teams and stakeholders, demonstrating accountability and the ability to take ownership of issues.
  
Knowledge with UNIX and Linux systems.
  
Practical knowledge of cloud infrastructure or containerization.
  
Background in telecoms and wireless communication.
  
Understanding of mobile communications standards like GSM and 4G.
  
Ability to understand and write code/scripts.
  
Knowledge within different type of databases.
  
Strong mentoring abilities.
  
  

Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English
  
OUR HIRING PROCESS
  
We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
  
We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/.
  
No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Cloud Architect - Google Cloud Platform
description:
Eira söker, för en kunds räkning, en erfaren och kundfokuserad Cloud Architect till Stockholm. Du blir en nyckelperson inom Google Cloud Platform i kundens svenska verksamhet och får stor möjlighet att påverka såväl strategi och erbjudande som den fortsatta expansionen på den svenska marknaden.
  
I rollen kombinerar du djup teknisk kompetens med kundrådgivning, teknisk discovery och lösningsdesign. Du får en central roll i att utveckla och forma bolagets tjänster inom Google Cloud Platform, leda kunddialoger, workshops och utbildningar samt bidra i både pre-sales och post-sales.
  
Du samarbetar nära kollegor inom teknik och försäljning i Sverige och övriga Norden. Rollen har ett brett ansvar och passar dig som vill vara med och påverka hur ett växande teknikbolag utvecklar sitt erbjudande inom Google Cloud.
  
Ditt ansvar
  
Driva tekniska dialoger med befintliga och potentiella kunder inom Google Cloud Platform
  
Genomföra behovsanalyser och omsätta kundernas krav till lösningsdesign och konkreta rekommendationer
  
Leda tekniska workshops, discovery-sessioner och utbildningar
  
Designa skalbara, säkra och kostnadseffektiva Google Cloud-lösningar utifrån kundens behov
  
Delta aktivt i pre-sales- och post-sales-processer tillsammans med bolagets kommersiella team
  
Agera rådgivare inom exempelvis cloud infrastructure, networking, data, analytics, AI/ML, säkerhet och kostnadsoptimering
  
Stötta kunder genom hela resan, från strategi och arkitektur till implementation och vidareutveckling
  
Bidra till att utveckla, strukturera och paketera bolagets tjänsteerbjudande inom Google Cloud Platform
  
Samarbeta nära med tekniska och kommersiella kollegor i Sverige och övriga Norden
  
  

Vad som gör dig till rätt person
  
  

**Vi söker dig som:**  

Har minst fem års praktisk erfarenhet som Cloud Architect eller från en liknande kundnära teknisk roll
  
Har gedigen praktisk erfarenhet av Google Cloud Platform och har designat, implementerat eller gett rådgivning kring verkliga GCP-miljöer
  
Kan visa exempel på kundprojekt där du haft ett övergripande ansvar, från analys och lösningsdesign till implementation och leverans
  
Kommunicerar tydligt och förtroendeingivande med såväl tekniska som icke-tekniska intressenter
  
Talar och skriver obehindrat på svenska och engelska
  
Trivs i en mindre och entreprenöriell organisation där rollen är bred och möjligheten att påverka är stor
  
Har ett konsultativt arbetssätt och en stark förmåga att skapa tekniskt förtroende hos kunder
  
Tycker om att kombinera teknisk problemlösning med kunddialog och kommersiella processer
  
Är nyfiken, initiativtagande och motiveras av att utveckla ett växande bolags Google Cloud-erbjudande
  
  

Meriterande
  
Google Cloud-certifieringar eller motsvarande certifieringar från andra molnleverantörer
  
Specialistkompetens inom exempelvis data, infrastruktur, säkerhet eller AI/ML
  
Erfarenhet från en Google Cloud-partner eller annan relevant moln- och konsultverksamhet
  
  

Praktiska detaljer
  
**Placering:** Centrala Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete
  
**Lön:** Grundlön om cirka 70 000–80 000 kronor per månad, beroende på erfarenhet och kompetensnivå
  
**Tillträde:** Enligt överenskommelse, gärna så snart som möjligt
  
Du kommer att arbeta nära kollegor i både Sverige och övriga Norden
  
  

Så här ansöker du
  
Eira hanterar rekryteringsprocessen för kundens räkning. Vi behandlar ansökningar löpande och kontaktar de kandidater vars erfarenhet och profil bäst matchar rollen.
  
Välkommen med din ansökan via Eira!

title: AI Engineer with a passion for AI services | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Do you want to build AI services that solve real operational challenges at scale? Join SEB’s AIOps team and help shape the next generation of intelligent, reliable and secure services for a modern banking environment.

At SEB, technology is at the heart of how we serve our customers and society. We combine the stability and responsibility of a leading bank with the curiosity, collaboration and engineering mindset of a modern tech organisation. From cloud and automation to AI and advanced analytics, you will work with an impressive technology landscape and contribute to solutions that matter. If you enjoy turning complex problems into practical, high-impact services, this could be your next challenge.

**Our Vision**
We build intelligent AI solutions for IT Operations that make our systems self‑healing, reliable and resilient.

**About the role**
 As an AI engineer in our AIOps team, you will help design, build, maintain and secure scalable AI services used across SEB. You will work close to real use cases, from ideas and experimentation to production-ready services that support teams across the bank.
The work is exploratory, practical and fast-moving. Requirements are not always fully defined, so you should be comfortable navigating ambiguity, asking the right questions and turning uncertainty into progress.

We believe in incremental progress, rapid learning and strong engineering discipline. You will contribute to a test-and-learn culture where small, well informed steps help us deliver robust solutions to complex problems.
You will join a small, passionate team building custom AI services that already support many internal teams. Today, our AIOps platform helps detect anomalies, automates labor-intensive tasks, intelligent agent driven operations and simplifying complex searches.

Read more here: https://sebgroup.com/career/working-at-seb/work-areas/tech-and-data/blog/2026/aiops-ai-for-it-operations  



**To thrive in this role, we believe you** **bring**:
* A curious, analytical mindset and the motivation to solve complex problems with practical, well-engineered solutions
* Documented experience in backend development, preferably with Go and Python
* Experience working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL and MySQL
* Understanding of frontend technologies such as React.js and JavaScript
* Experience building data architectures for compute-intensive services, from ingestion to inference
* Strong knowledge of software design patterns, architecture principles and operations for microservice applications
* Understanding of container technologies and modern cloud service architecture
* Excellent collaboration skills and the ability to contribute in a small, cross-functional team
* Previous experience in AI or machine learning


**What we offer**
* A collaborative team culture with openness, trust and room to influence
* Modern, agile ways of working with close connection to real business needs
* The opportunity to work with cutting-edge AI, automation and cloud-related technologies in a large-scale enterprise environment
* Continuous learning and development opportunities to grow your technical expertise and career
**Ready to help shape the future of AI-powered operations?**

Attach your CV and a personal letter telling us who you are, what motivates you and how you would like to contribute to our AI journey. We review applications on an ongoing basis, so you are welcome to apply today — and no later than 2026-08-31.

If you have questions about the position, please contact Team Manager, Benjamin Aktas, benjamin.aktas@seb.se

SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment. Learn more about working at SEB at www.sebgroup.com/career

.
company_description: More than 15.000 people work at SEB. Working in SEB means being part of an exciting journey, driven by digital transformation

title: Intern Projektledare till Software Center
description:
Vi på Software Cloud & Services söker nu en erfaren och engagerad projektledare till Software Center. Hos oss får du möjlighet att leda verksamhetsnära projekt som utvecklar våra arbetssätt, processer och leveranser. Rollen innebär ett stort eget ansvar och många kontaktytor där du tillsammans med verksamheten driver initiativ från idé till genomförande.



Vi erbjuder en dynamisk miljö där du får möjlighet att påverka, utvecklas och bidra till att skapa effektiva och hållbara arbetssätt för framtiden.  

Tillsammans skapar vi The Place To Be!


**Din roll**
------------



Som intern projektledare ansvarar du för att planera, leda och genomföra interna projekt och förändringsinitiativ inom Software Center.
  

Projekten kan omfatta verksamhetsutveckling, processförbättringar, införande av nya arbetssätt samt andra interna initiativ som stärker vår leveransförmåga och effektivitet.


**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter kommer att vara:**


* Planera, leda och följa upp verksamhetsutvecklande projekt från uppstart till avslut.
* Säkerställa att projekt levererar enligt uppsatta mål, tidplaner och förväntade effekter.
* Samordna aktiviteter mellan olika funktioner, intressenter och leverantörer.
* Identifiera förbättringsmöjligheter inom processer, arbetssätt och systemstöd.
* Driva workshops, möten och beslutsforum.
* Säkerställa tydlig projektstyrning, tidsplaner och uppföljning.
* Stödja verksamheten i förändringsarbete och implementering av nya arbetssätt.
* Arbeta nära verksamheten för att fånga behov, omsätta dessa till konkreta aktiviteter och säkerställa genomförande.
* Bidra till struktur, transparens och tydlig kommunikation i pågående initiativ.


Ditt team:



Du blir en del av vårt Software Center – ett team med projektledare och analytiker som tillsammans driver utveckling och skapar värde för organisationen. Hos oss får du en spännande och utvecklande roll i en framåtblickande organisation där du arbetar nära kompetenta kollegor med olika bakgrunder och expertområden. Vi tror att de bästa resultaten skapas tillsammans och värdesätter en kultur som präglas av samarbete, nyfikenhet och lärande.



Du rapporterar till Ulrika Nordenberg, Chef Software Center. Ulrikas ledarskap bygger på förtroende, närvaro och att ge medarbetare ansvar och mandat att påverka. Teamets olikheter, erfarenheter och perspektiv är en av våra största styrkor och bidrar till både utveckling och nytänkande i vardagen.


**Vem är du?**
--------------



Vi tror på dig och dina personliga egenskaper. Du ser eget driv som en av dina starkaste egenskaper, är strukturerad och trivs med att ta ansvar. Din lyhördhet och starka kommunikationsförmåga gör att du samarbetar väl med andra och skapar goda relationer. Du kombinerar ett strategiskt helhetsperspektiv med förmågan att omsätta idéer till konkreta resultat.



För att lyckas i rollen behöver du:


* Ha erfarenhet av att självständigt driva interna projekt och förändringsinitiativ.
* Ha god förståelse för verksamhetsprocesser och verksamhetsutveckling.
* Vara van vid att koordinera många intressenter och hålla ihop komplexa aktiviteter.
* Har god förmåga att planera, prioritera och skapa struktur.
* Är en skicklig kommunikatör i både tal och skrift på svenska och engelska.
* Ha erfarenhet av att leda workshops och skapa engagemang kring förändring.
* Ha erfarenhet av Dynamics CRM och förstår hur systemstöd kan användas för att effektivisera processer och arbetssätt.
* Ha ett starkt eget driv och förmåga att genomföra aktiviteter hela vägen i mål.


**Meriterande**


* Erfarenhet från Software-, IT- eller tjänsteverksamhet.
* Erfarenhet av processutveckling, förändringsledning oh implementera nya arbetssätt.
* Erfarenhet av att driva tvärfunktionella projekt nära operativ verksamhet med många intressenter och systemstöd som en del av förändringen.

**Om Atea**
-----------



Visste du att Atea är den ledande leverantören av it-infrastruktur i Norden och Baltikum? I Sverige är vi runt 2700 medarbetare fördelade på 35 kontor runt om i hela landet. Vår styrka ligger i vår kombination av lokal närvaro, vårt omfattande och heltäckande erbjudande samt alla våra specialister. Tillsammans med våra kunder och partners bygger vi Sverige med it och förbättra vardagen för skolbarn, lärare, äldre, sjukvård och näringslivet. Hos oss får du vara en del av världens mest hållbara it-servicebolag, där vi är med och påskyndar omställningen mot en mer hållbar it-värld.


På Atea blir du en del av en vardag och en kultur som präglas av framåtanda, laganda och humor. Vi har en vision om att vara "The Place to Be" – en plats där alla växer och trivs, med kollegor som bryr sig om dig, om kunderna och om samhället.


**Kontakt & mer information**
-----------------------------



Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Ulrika Nordenberg, Manager Software Center, via ulrika.nordenberg@atea.se. Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum, ansök därmed redan idag!



I den här rekryteringen kan arbetspsykologiska tester användas som en del av urvalsprocessen. Som en kvalitativ del i vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår slutkandidater en bakgrundskontroll för vissa av våra tjänster, detta för att öka kännedomen om dig som vår framtida medarbetare.



Vår arbetssätt är flexibelt - Vi tror på att ge möjlighet till flexibilitet i vardagen men merparten av arbetstiden som vi inte spenderar hos en kund eller på resande fot utgår vi från kontoret, som är vår primära arbetsplats.  

  

Atea vill vara The Place To Be, den självklara platsen, för alla människor då vi värdesätter och jobbar aktivt med mångfald och inkludering.



Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!


*Den här rekryteringen hanteras av oss på Atea och vi undanber oss därför samtal och mail från rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag*.

  

**Följ oss i sociala medier**

  

#LI-ONSITE

title: Head of Engineering - Campaign & Rewards
description:
A great opportunity has come up at **Betsson Group**. We are now looking for a **Head of Engineering for our Campaigns & Rewards Area.**


**The Wow**
-----------



As the Head of Engineering - Campaigns & Rewards, you will provide leadership for our engineering teams working on our Gaming product vertical. You will be accountable for the delivery, in terms of both time and quality, of all engineering teams working in the domain. You will work closely with your product counterparts on executing the roadmap, whilst driving technical excellence in terms of code quality, stability, scalability, and security.

  


**A taster of what you will be involved with:**
-----------------------------------------------


* Build and lead a high performing, top class engineering organisation covering multiple teams, setting out proper strategies towards this goal.
* Support, mentor and coach the engineering managers and leads.
* Collaborate with the architecture team and actively support their direction to drive the technical vision and enable the future state architectural design of the domain.
* Work closely with your product counterparts to develop, support and execute on product roadmaps and towards shared goals.
* Champion technical initiatives for consideration in the product development roadmap.
* Maintain a deep understanding of the gaming industry, performing competitor analysis, staying up-to-date with trends, emerging technologies.
* Foster a culture of innovation, continuous improvement, and collaboration within the team, promoting best practices in software engineering and agile methodologies.
* Drive the delivery of initiatives across the teams, ensuring that we are maximising the potential of our people and their delivery.
* Ensure the platform's reliability, security, and scalability by proactively addressing potential risks and performance bottlenecks.
* Manage engineering budgets, resources, and timelines effectively, delivering projects on time and within scope.
* Develop and implement metrics and KPIs to monitor platform performance, driving data-driven decision-making and improvements.
* Identify and address technical and process bottlenecks.
* Set an example in taking responsibility and ownership, which may also mean stepping into any missing role as and when may be required.


**What we are looking for:**
----------------------------

* Highly experienced in building and leading high performing engineering teams, with at least 2 years' experience in a senior / strategic engineering leadership role.
* A strong background in software engineering, preferably having 10+ years' experience working in engineering roles.
* Demonstrated experience in nurturing and coaching engineering leaders.
* Passionate about technology and how it can enable business growth and opportunities, in particular in how it satisfies user needs.
* Experience and understanding of agile practices and techniques for developing products.
* Confident working in a complex technical environment with hands-on experience working with highly available and high load transactional systems, with the ability to drive focus on performance, scalability and security.
* Experience in defining OKRs and KPIs, working with data to understand system(s) performance and the outcomes of product development.
* Proven ability to lead analyses and evaluations for complex decisions.
* Experience with cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP is a plus.

  


**Good to have:**
-----------------


* Relevant working experience in the gaming industry.
* Experience working with remote / geographically distributed teams.
* Familiarity with AI/ML technologies for personalised experiences.
* Experience in working with and managing third-party suppliers.
* A humble and inspirational leader who leads by example and fosters a culture of ownership and collaboration.
* Strong organisational, planning and project management skills.
* Excellent verbal & written communication skills, with the ability to explain technical topics to non-technical stakeholders.
* Excellent presentation skills, with the ability to present effectively to C-Level.
* Professional working proficiency in Swedish and English.


**What we offer**
-----------------



Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you're a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you'll fit right in.

  


**Challenge accepted?**
-----------------------


***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our*** ***Privacy Policy***

title: Junior Project Manager
description:
**Join Polar Point and help shape cybersecurity that makes a real difference**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------


At Polar Point, you will not be one employee among many. You will join a growing cybersecurity company where trust, customer impact and clarity are at the center of everything we do.


We work closely with CISOs, IT leaders and security teams to help organizations strengthen resilience, reduce risk and gain better control of their digital environments. Our work combines strategic advisory, hands-on implementation and long-term customer relationships.


As a Junior Project Manager, you will have the opportunity to support meaningful cybersecurity and IT security assignments, work close to experienced colleagues and contribute to Polar Point’s continued growth. You will help create structure, coordination and progress in customer projects where quality, communication and responsibility matter.

**About Polar Point**
---------------------


Polar Point AB is a Stockholm-based cybersecurity consultancy helping Nordic organizations navigate complexity with clarity. We provide senior expertise, advisory services and practical security solutions that enable customers to manage cyber risk confidently while staying focused on their business.


Our core areas include identity and access management, endpoint security, vulnerability management, security platform implementation, compliance support, security health checks, AI security and project-based cybersecurity delivery.


We are independent, pragmatic and outcome-focused. Our ambition is to be a trusted cybersecurity partner for organizations that need senior guidance, hands-on expertise and clear progress in complex environments.

**About the role**
------------------


As a Junior Project Manager at Polar Point, you will support the planning, coordination and successful delivery of cybersecurity and IT security projects for our customers. You will work closely with senior project managers, consultants, technical experts, vendors and customer stakeholders to help ensure projects are delivered with structure, quality and clear communication.


You will help create progress in assignments where multiple teams, priorities and dependencies need to come together. In practice, this means supporting project plans, follow-up, reporting, meeting coordination, documentation and stakeholder communication.


This role is ideal for someone with a solid project management foundation who enjoys working in a consulting environment, building trusted customer relationships and helping technical and business stakeholders move toward successful outcomes.

**What you will do**
--------------------

### **Project coordination and delivery support**

* Coordinate and support customer projects from initiation through delivery and follow-up.
* Develop and maintain project plans, time plans, status updates, budgets and reporting material.
* Track milestones, deliverables, risks, issues, dependencies and resource needs.
* Facilitate project meetings, workshops, status meetings and follow-up activities with customers and internal teams.
* Ensure clear communication between technical experts, vendors, customers and business stakeholders.
* Prepare project documentation, reports, decision material and executive-level updates when needed.
* Support project governance and help ensure alignment with internal standards and customer requirements.
* Contribute to strong customer relationships by delivering a high level of service, structure and professionalism.

### **Stakeholder coordination and communication**

* Help coordinate stakeholders across customer organizations, Polar Point, partners and vendors.
* Support senior project managers and consultants in planning, prioritization and follow-up.
* Communicate project status, risks and next steps in a clear and structured way.
* Help create clarity in situations where requirements, dependencies or responsibilities are changing.
* Support customer decision-making by preparing concise and relevant information.

### **Practice development and ways of working**

* Contribute to Polar Point’s project methods, templates, routines and delivery practices.
* Help improve how we plan, report and follow up cybersecurity and IT security assignments.
* Share learnings from customer projects and support continuous improvement across the team.
* Work close to experienced colleagues, founders and decision-makers as the company grows.

**Who you are**
---------------


You are a structured and communicative project professional who enjoys creating order, momentum and clarity. You are comfortable coordinating across different teams and stakeholders, and you understand that successful delivery depends on both planning discipline and strong relationships.


You probably enjoy working close to customers, following up details and helping teams move from plans to practical delivery. You take ownership, communicate clearly and care about delivering work that creates value.


You will likely thrive at Polar Point if you:

* want to be part of a growing specialist consultancy rather than a large anonymous organisation
* enjoy creating structure, follow-up and progress in customer assignments
* are comfortable coordinating between technical experts, customers and vendors
* value trust, transparency and long-term relationships
* like working close to experienced colleagues, founders and decision-makers
* want to grow your project management capability in cybersecurity and IT security delivery

**We believe you have**
-----------------------

* Approximately 5 years or more of experience managing or coordinating IT, cybersecurity or technology-related projects.
* Experience working in enterprise environments, consulting environments or complex organizations.
* Demonstrated ability to plan, coordinate and follow up cross-functional projects involving multiple stakeholders, priorities, timelines and risks.
* Good understanding of project management methods such as Agile, Scrum, Waterfall or hybrid delivery models.
* Strong organizational, planning and time management skills.
* Experience using project management tools such as Jira, Microsoft Project, Planner or similar platforms.
* Ability to work independently while collaborating effectively with consultants, technical specialists and customer stakeholders.
* Strong communication and presentation skills in both Swedish and English.
* Fluency in Swedish, written and spoken.
* Ability to obtain and maintain security clearance when required.

**It is a plus if you also have**
---------------------------------

* Previous experience in cybersecurity, information security or IT consulting.
* Experience from large, complex or regulated organizations.
* Experience coordinating projects involving security platforms, identity, endpoint security, vulnerability management, compliance or cloud services.
* Experience preparing reports or decision material for senior stakeholders.
* Experience working with frameworks or regulations such as ISO 27001, NIS2, NIST CSF, DORA or similar.
* Relevant project management certifications such as PMP, PRINCE2, Scrum Master, Agile certification or similar.


Certifications are valuable, but practical experience, sound judgement and proven customer impact matter most to us.

**What we offer**
-----------------


At Polar Point, you will join a senior and entrepreneurial team with high ambitions and low prestige. We offer an environment where you can make a visible impact from day one - both for our customers and for the company we are building.


We offer:

* meaningful cybersecurity and IT security assignments with real customer impact
* close collaboration with experienced consultants, founders and company leadership
* the opportunity to shape our services, methods and ways of working
* a trust-based culture with high responsibility and flexibility
* strong focus on quality, clarity and long-term customer relationships
* room to grow professionally as Polar Point grows
* access to a wider specialist network through our partner ecosystem and alliance relationships
* the chance to help build a cybersecurity consultancy with a clear Nordic identity and strong ambitions

**Location and working model**
------------------------------


The role is based in Stockholm, with flexibility depending on assignment and customer needs. Some work will be performed remotely, while customer presence is expected when it creates value or is required for delivery.


Because many of our customers operate in Swedish-speaking environments, fluent Swedish is required.

**Apply**
---------


If you want to help build a trusted cybersecurity consultancy with senior colleagues, meaningful assignments and real influence, we would like to hear from you.


At Polar Point, you will help customers strengthen security where it matters most - from users and identities to devices, platforms and business-critical environments.

title: Senior Cyber Security Consultant
description:

------------------------------------------------------------------------------


At Polar Point, you will not be one consultant among many. You will join a growing cybersecurity company where senior expertise, trust and customer impact are at the center of everything we do.


We work closely with CISOs, IT leaders and security teams to help organizations strengthen resilience, reduce risk and gain better control of their digital environments. Our work combines strategic advisory, hands-on implementation and long-term customer relationships.


As a Senior Cyber Security Consultant, you will have the opportunity to influence both our customers’ security journeys and Polar Point’s continued growth. You will work in meaningful assignments, contribute to our service offerings and help build a company where technical excellence, clarity and responsibility matter.

**About Polar Point**
---------------------


Polar Point AB is a Stockholm-based cybersecurity consultancy helping Nordic organizations navigate complexity with clarity. We provide senior expertise, advisory services and practical security solutions that enable customers to manage cyber risk confidently while staying focused on their business.


Our core areas include identity and access management, endpoint security, vulnerability management, security platform implementation, compliance support, security health checks, AI security and project-based cybersecurity delivery.


We are independent, pragmatic and outcome-focused. Our ambition is to be a trusted cybersecurity partner for organizations that need senior guidance, hands-on expertise and clear progress in complex environments.

**About the role**
------------------


As a Senior Cyber Security Consultant at Polar Point, you will play a key role in delivering high-value cybersecurity services to our customers while contributing to the growth and development of our consulting practice.


You will combine deep technical understanding with advisory capability and business awareness. In practice, this means that you can move comfortably between strategic discussions with customer leadership, solution design with technical teams and hands-on delivery in complex customer environments.


You will act as a trusted advisor, lead important security initiatives and help customers prioritise improvements that reduce risk and strengthen operational maturity. You will also contribute to business development in a consultative way by identifying customer needs, shaping new engagements and helping develop services that create measurable value.

**What you will do**
--------------------

### **Customer delivery and technical leadership**

* Lead and deliver cybersecurity consulting engagements in complex customer environments.
* Design, implement and improve security solutions across endpoint security, vulnerability management, identity, cloud and hybrid environments.

* Support customer decision-making by explaining complex security topics in a clear and business-relevant way.

### **Business development and practice growth**

* Support pre-sales activities such as customer meetings, solution design, scoping and effort estimation.
* Contribute to proposals, presentations and service development.
* Help shape and improve Polar Point’s cybersecurity offerings.
* Share knowledge internally and support colleagues as we grow the consulting team.
* Contribute to long-term customer relationships by delivering quality, clarity and trust in every assignment.

**Who you are**
---------------


You are an experienced cybersecurity professional who enjoys combining technical depth with advisory work. You are confident in customer-facing situations and comfortable working with both technical specialists and senior decision-makers.


You probably enjoy solving complex problems, creating structure in uncertain situations and helping customers move from analysis to practical improvement. You take ownership, communicate clearly and care about delivering outcomes that matter.


You will likely thrive at Polar Point if you:

* want to be part of a growing specialist consultancy rather than a large anonymous organisation
* enjoy having influence over both customer delivery and company development
* are comfortable taking senior responsibility in customer engagements
* value trust, transparency and long-term relationships
* like working close to experienced colleagues, founders and decision-makers
* want to combine strategic advisory with hands-on cybersecurity delivery

**We believe you have**
-----------------------

* Approximately 10 years or more of experience in cybersecurity, security consulting or senior security delivery roles.
* Strong experience delivering cybersecurity improvements in customer or enterprise environments.
* Solid knowledge in one or more of the following areas: endpoint security, vulnerability management, identity and access management, cloud security, Microsoft security services, Active Directory, Microsoft Entra ID or security platform implementation.
* Experience leading or contributing to security projects, implementations or improvement programmes.
* Ability to translate technical findings into business-relevant recommendations.
* Experience working with senior stakeholders such as CISOs, CIOs, IT leaders or security managers.
* A consultative mindset and the ability to identify customer needs, shape solutions and contribute to business development.
* Strong communication skills in both Swedish and English.
* Fluency in Swedish, written and spoken.
* Ability to obtain and maintain security clearance when required.

**It is a plus if you also have**
---------------------------------

* Experience from large, complex or regulated organizations.
* Experience with security assessments, security health checks, Zero Trust initiatives or cyber maturity improvement.
* Experience with technologies and platforms such as Microsoft 365 Security, Microsoft Entra ID, Active Directory, Tanium, Trend Vision One, BeyondTrust, Rapid7 or similar tools.
* Experience in IAM, PAM, endpoint management, EDR/XDR, vulnerability management, compliance or security operations.
* Experience working with frameworks or regulations such as ISO 27001, NIS2, NIST CSF, DORA or similar.
* Relevant certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CCSP, Microsoft security certifications or vendor-specific certifications.


Certifications are valuable, but practical experience, sound judgement and proven customer impact matter most to us.

**What we offer**
-----------------


At Polar Point, you will join a senior and entrepreneurial team with high ambitions and low prestige. We offer an environment where you can make a visible impact from day one - both for our customers and for the company we are building.


We offer:

* senior and meaningful cybersecurity assignments with real customer impact
* close collaboration with experienced consultants, founders and company leadership
* the opportunity to shape our services, methods and ways of working
* a trust-based culture with high responsibility and flexibility
* strong focus on quality, clarity and long-term customer relationships
* room to grow professionally as Polar Point grows
* access to a wider specialist network through our partner ecosystem and alliance relationships
* the chance to help build a cybersecurity consultancy with a clear Nordic identity and strong ambitions

**Location and working model**
------------------------------


The role is based in Stockholm, with flexibility depending on assignment and customer needs. Some work will be performed remotely, while customer presence is expected when it creates value or is required for delivery.


Because many of our customers operate in Swedish-speaking environments, fluent Swedish is required.

**Apply**
---------


If you want to help build a trusted cybersecurity consultancy with senior colleagues, meaningful assignments and real influence, we would like to hear from you.


At Polar Point, you will help customers strengthen security where it matters most - from users and identities to devices, platforms and business-critical environments.

title: Art Director
description:
Art Director sökes till varumärkesbyrå i Göteborg

Är du en kreativ Art Director med några års erfarenhet och en passion för design, varumärken och kommunikation? Då kan du vara den vi söker.

R2 Branding är en etablerad varumärkesbyrå i Göteborg som hjälper företag att bygga, utveckla och stärka sina varumärken. Nu söker vi en Art Director som vill vara med och skapa kreativa koncept och visuella lösningar som gör skillnad – främst i digitala och sociala medier.

Om rollen

Som Art Director hos R2 Branding kommer du att arbeta med:

* Grafisk design och visuell kommunikation stillbild och rörligt
* Konceptutveckling för marknadsföring och kampanjer
* Produktion av material för både digitala kanaler och print
* Vidareutveckling av kunders visuella identitet och varumärke
* Samarbete med kunder och kollegor genom hela den kreativa processen

Vi söker dig som

* Har minst några års erfarenhet som Art Director eller grafisk designer främst inom digital kommunikation
* Är kreativ, idérik och har ett starkt öga för form, färg och typografi
* Har erfarenhet av konceptutveckling och marknadskommunikation
* Är van att arbeta självständigt och samtidigt trivs i team
* Har god känsla för struktur och kan hantera flera projekt parallellt
* Skapa innehåll och idéer för content
* Förståelse för det digitala landskapet och kommunikation i sociala medier
* Ett plus är om du också gillar fotografering och film

Vi ser gärna att du behärskar

* Adobe Creative Cloud (InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop och gärna After Effects eller Premiere Pro)
* Figma
* Canva
* Microsoft Office 365

Vi erbjuder

Hos R2 Branding får du arbeta i en kreativ miljö med varierande uppdrag för kunder inom olika branscher. Vi värdesätter engagemang, samarbete och hög kvalitet, och ger dig möjlighet att utvecklas tillsammans med ett erfaret team och våra kunder.

Låter det som något för dig? Skicka din ansökan med CV, personligt brev och portfolio. Vi intervjuar kandidater löpande, så vänta inte med din ansökan.

Ansökningen skickas till

Tjänsten är en 100% tillsvidare anställning.

Sista ansökningsdatum är den 28 Augusti 2026.

Välkommen till R2 Branding och bli en del av vårt trevliga gäng i Göteborg!

Kika gärna in våra sociala medier

Lön: Upp till 40 000,00kr per månad

Förmåner:

* Friskvårdsbidrag

Arbetsort: På plats

title: Senior Specialist - Data Engineering
description:
**Role description** **Overview**



LTM — a Larsen & Toubro company — is an AI-centric global technology services company and the Business Creativity partner to the world’s largest and most disruptive enterprises. We bring human insights and intelligent systems together to help clients create greater value at the intersection of technology and domain expertise. Our capabilities span integrated operations, transformation, and business AI — enabling new ways of working, new productivity paradigms, and new roads to value. Together with over 87,000 employees across 40 countries and our global network of partners, LTM owns business outcomes for our clients, helping them not just outperform the market, but to Outcreate it.


### **Website**



Role - SE\_Data Engineer - Senior Professional 1



**Senior Data Engineer owning and improving** platform data models, ingestion pipelines, integrations, data quality controls, backend/cloud infrastructure, observability, and technical architecture support.



Assignment Overview:
The consultant will own and improve the platform’s data foundation, including data models, ingestion flows, integrations, and data quality. The role also includes contributing to backend and cloud infrastructure and ensuring reliable, scalable, and observable data and platform capabilities aligned with product and business priorities.
Responsibilities:
Own and evolve the platform’s data model to support multiple sellers, markets, and integrations
Design and maintain ingestion pipelines (imports, validation, transformation, retries, auditability)
Establish reliable data pipelines, contracts, and quality controls for trusted business metrics
Handle integrations and external data sources (DMS/ERP, Snowflake, CSV/FTP, etc.)
Improve data quality, traceability, and observability across platform domains
Contribute to backend and cloud infrastructure (AWS, databases, jobs, monitoring, scaling)
Collaborate with Product Lead and Lead Developer on architecture and priorities
Support engineering standards, CI/CD, and documentation
Act as technical representative in data flows and integration discussions
Education (Must Have/Nice To Have):
Must Have: Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
Nice To Have: Advanced degree in relevant field
Experience (Must Have/Nice To Have):
Must Have:
Senior experience in data engineering, backend, or platform engineering
Strong experience with SQL, relational data modeling, and data pipelines
Experience with APIs and cloud environments (preferably AWS)
Nice To Have:
Experience with PostgreSQL, Node.js/TypeScript, Python
Experience with Snowflake and modern data stack
Experience from marketplace platforms or multi-stakeholder systems
Experience from startup, venture, or fast-moving product environments
Language:
English + Swedish + Additional European languages seen as a merit
Personal / Soft Skills:
Structured and analytical with strong problem-solving ability
Strong technical judgment and decision-making skills
Comfortable with broad responsibilities and shifting priorities
Pragmatic and delivery-oriented
Strong collaboration and communication skills
AI-native mindset (comfortable using and validating AI tools in development work)
Other Specifications:
Comfortable working in a venture environment with high ownership
Ability to translate business needs into scalable technical solutions
Strong focus on data quality, observability, and long-term scalability
Willingness to contribute beyond strict role boundaries (platform, backend, cloud)  

**Skills** **Mandatory Skills :** Data Architecture, MySQL

 **About LTM**  

LTM is an AI-centric global technology services company and the Business Creativity partner to the world’s largest and most disruptive enterprises. We bring human insights and intelligent systems together to help clients create greater value at the intersection of technology and domain expertise. Our capabilities span integrated operations, transformation, and business AI — enabling new ways of working, new productivity paradigms, and new roads to value. Together with over 87,000 employees across 40 countries and our global network of partners, LTM — a Larsen & Toubro company — owns business outcomes for our clients, helping them not just outperform the market, but to Outcreate it. Please also note that neither LTM nor any of its authorized recruitment agencies/partners charge any candidate registration fee or any other fees from talent (candidates) towards appearing for an interview or securing employment/internship. Candidates shall be solely responsible for verifying the credentials of any agency/consultant that claims to be working with LTM for recruitment. Please note that anyone who relies on the representations made by fraudulent employment agencies does so at their own risk, and LTM disclaims any liability in case of loss or damage suffered as a consequence of the same. Recruitment Fraud Alert - https://www.ltimindtree.com/recruitment-fraud-alert/

title: Head of Development and Support
description:
Are you an experienced leader with a passion for innovation, business growth, and customer-focused solutions? If so, we have an exciting opportunity for you! Join ASSA ABLOY in Sweden as our Head of Development and Support. You will be part of a collaborative culture that empowers you to build a career you can be proud of.  


**What you would do as our Head of Development and Support**  

You will lead the development and delivery of customer-centric solutions that drive business growth and create value for our customers. You will be responsible for aligning global platforms with local market needs, while leading the Development and Support organization to deliver innovation, service excellence, and continuous improvement.  



Working closely with commercial teams, product management, and global stakeholders, you will strengthen our market position, enhance the customer experience, and support the growth of our access control and connected care solutions.  



This role reports to the Head of Business Unit Senior Care Nordics.  



You would also:  

* Drive the solution strategy and growth agenda, turning business needs into market-relevant offerings that create customer value and support sustainable growth.
* Identify and develop new business opportunities to strengthen revenue growth, market position, and customer value propositions.
* Lead, develop, and transform the Development, Software Design, and Solution Development.
* Drive operational excellence and continuous improvement across development, focusing on quality, efficiency, scalability, and customer experience.
* Establish clear goals, governance, and KPIs while fostering a customer-focused, collaborative, and high-performing culture.
  


**The skills and experience you need**  

We are looking for someone who has:  

* Proven leadership experience within solution development, product management, commercial development, or related functions, with the ability to inspire teams, drive performance, and lead through change.
* A track record of driving growth and innovation, including developing customer-centric value propositions, bringing solutions to market, and creating measurable business impact.
* Experience from technology-driven environments, preferably within access solutions, IoT, connected care, or similar industries, including the development of cloud-based platforms, products, or services.
* Demonstrated success in leading transformation and organizational development, building capabilities, driving continuous improvement, and navigating complex change initiatives.
* Strong strategic, analytical, and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in an international matrix organization, build lasting relationships, and communicate clearly in English (Swedish is considered an advantage).
  


**What we offer**

We’re passionate about providing amazing opportunities and benefits, so you can continue and progress a lifelong career with us – here’s what we have to offer:
* A key leadership role in a **global, market-leading organisation**.
* Learning and career development opportunities, whether it’s online learning, management training or enhancing your skills.
* A competitive salary and benefits package.
* A dynamic and inclusive work environment.
* The chance to make a meaningful impact in attracting and retaining top talent.
* Flexible and hybrid working model.

  


**We review applications regularly, so don’t wait**

We are building diverse, inclusive teams, and encourage applications from everyone who can see themselves working with us. Just set up your profile and apply here.

To make sure your personal data is safe, we don’t look at any applications sent by email or post. If you have any questions about the role or the process, email Alexandra Kymäläinen, Talent Acquisition Business Partner, at alexandra.kymalainen@assaabloy.com  



Depending on the risk profile for the role, a background screening will need to be performed. Final candidates may therefore be a subject to a background screening. The performance of a background check is subject to consent and based on our Applicant Privacy Notice.  



Let’s create a safer and more open world - together!  



To find out more about us, visit www.assaabloy.com  


**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**  

Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.

As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.

As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

#LI-WGIE
